LOG_DEBUG(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__)",
  "oldString": "#include \"response_cache.h\"\n\n#include <errno.h>\n#include <inttypes.h>\n#include <stdatomic.h>\n#include <stdbool.h>\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include <unistd.h>\n\n#ifdef MERCURY_DEBUG\n#    define DEBUG_LOG(fmt, ...)                                                  \\\n        do {                                                                     \\\n            fprintf(stderr, \"[RCACHE][DEBUG] \" fmt \"\\n\", ##__VA_ARGS__);         \\\n        } while (0)\n#else\n#    define DEBUG_LOG(...) /* no-op */\n#endif",
  "originalFile": "```c\n/**\n * src/cache/response_cache.c\n *\n * MercuryMonolith Commerce Hub \u2013 Response Cache\n *\n * A high-performance, thread-safe, in-memory LRU cache for serialized HTTP /\n * GraphQL responses.  The cache supports TTL-based eviction, Prometheus-style\n * metrics, structured logging, and graceful shutdown.  This component is\n * designed to be embedded in a single-process \u201cmicro-service\u201d monolith and\n * therefore avoids global symbols other than the public API declared in\n * response_cache.h.\n *\n * Build flags:\n *   -std=c11 -pthread -DMERCURY_DEBUG\n *\n * Author:    MercuryMonolith Core Team\n * Copyright: (c) 2024 Pioneer Retail Systems\n */\n\n#include \"response_cache.h\"\n\n#include <errno.h>\n#include <inttypes.h>\n#include <stdatomic.h>\n#include <stdbool.h>\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include <unistd.h>\n\n#ifdef MERCURY_DEBUG\n#    define DEBUG_LOG(fmt, ...)                                                  \\\n        do {                                                                     \\\n            fprintf(stderr, \"[RCACHE][DEBUG] \" fmt \"\\n\", ##__VA_ARGS__);         \\\n        } while (0)\n#else\n#    define DEBUG_LOG(...) /* no-op */\n#endif\n\n/* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n/*                              Internal structs                               */\n/* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\ntypedef struct cache_entry_t {\n    char                     *key;       /* Heap-allocated, null-terminated.     */\n    uint8_t                  *payload;   /* Serialized response buffer.          */\n    size_t                    payload_sz;\n    uint64_t                  expires_at;/* Epoch millis.                        */\n    struct cache_entry_t     *prev;      /* LRU doubly-linked list.              */\n    struct cache_entry_t     *next;\n    struct cache_entry_t     *hnext;     /* Hash chain link.                     */\n} cache_entry_t;\n\ntypedef struct {\n    /* Configuration */\n    size_t          capacity;      /* Max # entries                             */\n    uint64_t        default_ttl;   /* Milliseconds                              */\n    /* State */\n    size_t          table_size;    /* Hash table buckets                        */\n    cache_entry_t **table;         /* Hash table                                */\n    cache_entry_t  *lru_head;      /* Most recently used                        */\n    cache_entry_t  *lru_tail;      /* Least recently used                       */\n    size_t          size;          /* Current # entries                         */\n    /* Concurrency */\n    pthread_rwlock_t rwlock;       /* Global RW lock                            */\n    /* Metrics */\n    atomic_uint_fast64_t hits;\n    atomic_uint_fast64_t misses;\n    atomic_uint_fast64_t evictions;\n} cache_ctx_t;\n\n/* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n/*                           Static-scope declarations                         */\n/* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\nstatic uint64_t _now_millis(void);\nstatic uint64_t _hash(const char *s);\nstatic void     _promote(cache_ctx_t *ctx, cache_entry_t *e);\nstatic void     _evict_tail(cache_ctx_t *ctx);\nstatic void     _remove_entry(cache_ctx_t *ctx, cache_entry_t *e);\nstatic void     _free_entry(cache_entry_t *e);\n\n/* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n/*                             Public API impl                                 */\n/* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\ncache_handle_t cache_create(size_t capacity, uint64_t default_ttl_ms)\n{\n    if (capacity == 0) {\n        errno = EINVAL;\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    cache_ctx_t *ctx = calloc(1, sizeof(*ctx));\n    if (!ctx) return NULL;\n\n    ctx->capacity     = capacity;\n    ctx->default_ttl  = default_ttl_ms ? default_ttl_ms : 30000; /* 30s default */\n    ctx->table_size   = 1;\n    while (ctx->table_size < capacity * 2) ctx->table_size <<= 1;\n\n    ctx->table = calloc(ctx->table_size, sizeof(cache_entry_t *));\n    if (!ctx->table) {\n        free(ctx);\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    pthread_rwlock_init(&ctx->rwlock, NULL);\n\n    DEBUG_LOG(\"Cache created (capacity=%zu, ttl=%\" PRIu64 \"ms, buckets=%zu)\",\n              capacity, ctx->default_ttl, ctx->table_size);\n\n    return (cache_handle_t)ctx;\n}\n\nvoid cache_destroy(cache_handle_t handle)\n{\n    if (!handle) return;\n    cache_ctx_t *ctx = (cache_ctx_t *)handle;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n    for (size_t i = 0; i < ctx->table_size; ++i) {\n        cache_entry_t *e = ctx->table[i];\n        while (e) {\n            cache_entry_t *next = e->hnext;\n            _free_entry(e);\n            e = next;\n        }\n    }\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n\n    pthread_rwlock_destroy(&ctx->rwlock);\n    free(ctx->table);\n    free(ctx);\n}\n\nbool cache_get(cache_handle_t handle,\n               const char   *key,\n               uint8_t     **out_payload,\n               size_t       *out_sz,\n               uint64_t     *out_ttl_ms_remaining)\n{\n    if (!handle || !key || !out_payload || !out_sz) {\n        errno = EINVAL;\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    cache_ctx_t *ctx = (cache_ctx_t *)handle;\n    bool          hit  = false;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_rdlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n\n    uint64_t       h     = _hash(key) & (ctx->table_size - 1);\n    cache_entry_t *entry = ctx->table[h];\n\n    while (entry && strcmp(entry->key, key) != 0)\n        entry = entry->hnext;\n\n    if (entry) {\n        uint64_t now = _now_millis();\n        if (entry->expires_at > now) {\n            /* Cache hit */\n            hit = true;\n            *out_sz      = entry->payload_sz;\n            *out_payload = malloc(entry->payload_sz);\n            if (*out_payload == NULL) {\n                pthread_rwlock_unlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n                errno = ENOMEM;\n                return false;\n            }\n            memcpy(*out_payload, entry->payload, entry->payload_sz);\n\n            if (out_ttl_ms_remaining)\n                *out_ttl_ms_remaining = entry->expires_at - now;\n        }\n    }\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n\n    if (hit) {\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&ctx->hits, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n        /* Promotion done outside read lock to minimize contention */\n        pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n        _promote(ctx, entry);\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n    } else {\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&ctx->misses, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n\n    return hit;\n}\n\nbool cache_put(cache_handle_t   handle,\n               const char      *key,\n               const uint8_t   *payload,\n               size_t           payload_sz,\n               uint64_t         ttl_ms /* 0 = use default */)\n{\n    if (!handle || !key || !payload || payload_sz == 0) {\n        errno = EINVAL;\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    cache_ctx_t *ctx = (cache_ctx_t *)handle;\n    uint64_t     now = _now_millis();\n\n    /* Allocate a copy before taking locks to shorten critical section */\n    cache_entry_t *new_entry = calloc(1, sizeof(*new_entry));\n    if (!new_entry) {\n        errno = ENOMEM;\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    new_entry->key        = strdup(key);\n    new_entry->payload    = malloc(payload_sz);\n    if (!new_entry->key || !new_entry->payload) {\n        _free_entry(new_entry);\n        errno = ENOMEM;\n        return false;\n    }\n    memcpy(new_entry->payload, payload, payload_sz);\n    new_entry->payload_sz = payload_sz;\n    new_entry->expires_at = now + (ttl_ms ? ttl_ms : ctx->default_ttl);\n\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n\n    /* Remove existing entry if present */\n    uint64_t       h     = _hash(key) & (ctx->table_size - 1);\n    cache_entry_t *e     = ctx->table[h];\n    cache_entry_t *prevh = NULL;\n    while (e && strcmp(e->key, key) != 0) {\n        prevh = e;\n        e     = e->hnext;\n    }\n    if (e) {\n        _remove_entry(ctx, e);\n        if (prevh)\n            prevh->hnext = e->hnext;\n        else\n            ctx->table[h] = e->hnext;\n        _free_entry(e);\n    }\n\n    /* Insert new entry at head of hash chain */\n    new_entry->hnext  = ctx->table[h];\n    ctx->table[h]     = new_entry;\n\n    /* Insert into LRU front */\n    new_entry->prev = NULL;\n    new_entry->next = ctx->lru_head;\n    if (ctx->lru_head)\n        ctx->lru_head->prev = new_entry;\n    ctx->lru_head = new_entry;\n    if (!ctx->lru_tail)\n        ctx->lru_tail = new_entry;\n\n    if (ctx->size < ctx->capacity)\n        ++ctx->size;\n    else\n        _evict_tail(ctx);\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n\n    return true;\n}\n\nbool cache_invalidate(cache_handle_t handle, const char *key)\n{\n    if (!handle || !key) {\n        errno = EINVAL;\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    cache_ctx_t *ctx = (cache_ctx_t *)handle;\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n\n    uint64_t       h     = _hash(key) & (ctx->table_size - 1);\n    cache_entry_t *e     = ctx->table[h];\n    cache_entry_t *prevh = NULL;\n    while (e && strcmp(e->key, key) != 0) {\n        prevh = e;\n        e     = e->hnext;\n    }\n    if (!e) {\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n        errno = ENOENT;\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    _remove_entry(ctx, e);\n    if (prevh)\n        prevh->hnext = e->hnext;\n    else\n        ctx->table[h] = e->hnext;\n\n    _free_entry(e);\n    ctx->size--;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n    return true;\n}\n\nvoid cache_clear(cache_handle_t handle)\n{\n    if (!handle) return;\n    cache_ctx_t *ctx = (cache_ctx_t *)handle;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n\n    for (size_t i = 0; i < ctx->table_size; ++i) {\n        cache_entry_t *e = ctx->table[i];\n        while (e) {\n            cache_entry_t *next = e->hnext;\n            _free_entry(e);\n            e = next;\n        }\n        ctx->table[i] = NULL;\n    }\n    ctx->lru_head = ctx->lru_tail = NULL;\n    ctx->size     = 0;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&ctx->rwlock);\n}\n\nvoid cache_stats(cache_handle_t     handle,\n                 cache_stats_t     *out_stats)\n{\n    if (!handle || !out_stats) return;\n    cache_ctx_t *ctx = (cache_ctx_t *)handle;\n\n    out_stats->capacity   = ctx->capacity;\n    out_stats->size       = ctx->size;\n    out_stats->hits       = atomic_load(&ctx->hits);\n    out_stats->misses     = atomic_load(&ctx->misses);\n    out_stats->evictions  = atomic_load(&ctx->evictions);\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n/*                         Internal helper implementations                     */\n/* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n\nstatic uint64_t _now_millis(void)\n{\n    struct timespec ts;\n    clock_gettime(CLOCK_REALTIME, &ts);\n    return (uint64_t)(ts.tv_sec) * 1000 + ts.tv_nsec / 1000000;\n}\n\nstatic uint64_t _hash(const char *s)\n{\n    /* FNV-1a 64-bit */\n    uint64_t hash = 14695981039346656037ULL;\n    for (; *s; ++s) {\n        hash ^= (unsigned char)*s;\n        hash *= 1099511628211ULL;\n    }\n    return hash;\n}\n\nstatic void _promote(cache_ctx_t *ctx, cache_entry_t *e)\n{\n    if (!e || ctx->lru_head == e) return;\n\n    /* Detach from current position */\n    if (e->prev)\n        e->prev->next = e->next;\n    if (e->next)\n        e->next->prev = e->prev;\n    if (ctx->lru_tail == e)\n        ctx->lru_tail = e->prev;\n\n    /* Move to front */\n    e->prev = NULL;\n    e->next = ctx->lru_head;\n    if (ctx->lru_head)\n        ctx->lru_head->prev = e;\n    ctx->lru_head = e;\n    if (!ctx->lru_tail)\n        ctx->lru_tail = e;\n}\n\nstatic void _evict_tail(cache_ctx_t *ctx)\n{\n    if (!ctx->lru_tail) return;\n\n    cache_entry_t *victim = ctx->lru_tail;\n\n    /* Remove from hash table */\n    uint64_t       h     = _hash(victim->key) & (ctx->table_size - 1);\n    cache_entry_t *e     = ctx->table[h];\n    cache_entry_t *prevh = NULL;\n    while (e && e != victim) {\n        prevh = e;\n        e     = e->hnext;\n    }\n    if (e) {\n        if (prevh)\n            prevh->hnext = e->hnext;\n        else\n            ctx->table[h] = e->hnext;\n    }\n\n    _remove_entry(ctx, victim);\n    _free_entry(victim);\n    atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&ctx->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n}\n\nstatic void _remove_entry(cache_ctx_t *ctx, cache_entry_t *e)\n{\n    if (e->prev)\n        e->prev->next = e->next;\n    if (e->next)\n        e->next->prev = e->prev;\n    if (ctx->lru_head == e)\n        ctx->lru_head = e->next;\n    if (ctx->lru_tail == e)\n        ctx->lru_tail = e->prev;\n}\n\nstatic void _free_entry(cache_entry_t *e)\n{\n    if (!e) return;\n    free(e->key);\n    free(e->payload);\n    free(e);\n}\n\n/* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n/*                               Unit-test stub                                */\n/* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n#ifdef MERCURY_CACHE_TEST\n\n#include <assert.h>\n\nstatic void test_basic(void)\n{\n    cache_handle_t c = cache_create(2, 1000);\n    assert(c);\n\n    const char *k1 = \"foo\";\n    const char *v1 = \"bar\";\n\n    assert(cache_put(c, k1, (const uint8_t *)v1, strlen(v1) + 1, 0));\n\n    uint8_t *out;\n    size_t   sz;\n    assert(cache_get(c, k1, &out, &sz, NULL));\n    assert(sz == strlen(v1) + 1 && strcmp((char *)out, v1) == 0);\n    free(out);\n\n    cache_destroy(c);\n}\n\nint main(void)\n{\n    test_basic();\n    puts(\"Response cache unit tests passed.\");\n    return 0;\n}\n\n#endif /* MERCURY_CACHE_TEST */\n```\n\n```c\n/**\n * src/cache/response_cache.h\n *\n * Public API for the in-memory response cache used by the MercuryMonolith\n * \u201cmicro-service\u201d monolith.  This header is consumed by the API gateway and\n * by individual service handlers to accelerate frequently requested resources.\n */\n\n#pragma once\n\n#include <stddef.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <stdbool.h>\n\n#ifdef __cplusplus\nextern \"C\" {\n#endif\n\n/* Opaque pointer to internal cache context */\ntypedef void *cache_handle_t;\n\n/* Statistics structure for Prometheus export */\ntypedef struct {\n    size_t   capacity;   /* Configured capacity (items)            */\n    size_t   size;       /* Current items in cache                 */\n    uint64_t hits;       /* Cumulative cache hits                  */\n    uint64_t misses;     /* Cumulative cache misses                */\n    uint64_t evictions;  /* Cumulative evicted entries             */\n} cache_stats_t;\n\n/* Create a cache instance\n * capacity            \u2013 maximum number of entries\n * default_ttl_ms      \u2013 default time-to-live in milliseconds (0 => 30s)\n * returns opaque handle or NULL on error (check errno)\n */\ncache_handle_t cache_create(size_t capacity, uint64_t default_ttl_ms);\n\n/* Destroy a cache instance and free all resources */\nvoid cache_destroy(cache_handle_t handle);\n\n/* Retrieve an entry by key.  Returns true on hit, false on miss.\n * The payload is heap-allocated and must be free()-d by caller.\n * out_ttl_ms_remaining is optional (may be NULL).\n */\nbool cache_get(cache_handle_t handle,\n               const char   *key,\n               uint8_t     **out_payload,\n               size_t       *out_sz,\n               uint64_t     *out_ttl_ms_remaining);\n\n/* Insert or replace a cache entry */\nbool cache_put(cache_handle_t   handle,\n               const char      *key,\n               const uint8_t   *payload,\n               size_t           payload_sz,\n               uint64_t         ttl_ms);\n\n/* Explicitly invalidate an entry */\nbool cache_invalidate(cache_handle_t handle, const char *key);\n\n/* Remove all entries */\nvoid cache_clear(cache_handle_t handle);\n\n/* Retrieve statistics */\nvoid cache_stats(cache_handle_t handle, cache_stats_t *out_stats);\n\n#ifdef __cplusplus\n}\n#endif\n```",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " #include <time.h>",
        " #include <unistd.h>",
        " ",
        "-#ifdef MERCURY_DEBUG",
        "-#    define DEBUG_LOG(fmt, ...)                                                  \\",
        "-        do {                                                                     \\",
        "-            fprintf(stderr, \"[RCACHE][DEBUG] \" fmt \"\\n\", ##__VA_ARGS__);         \\",
        "-        } while (0)",
        "-#else",
        "-#    define DEBUG_LOG(...) /* no-op */",
        "-#endif",
        "+#include \"logging.h\"",
        " ",
        "+/* Map legacy DEBUG_LOG to new centralized logging */",
        "+#define DEBUG_LOG(fmt, ...) LOG_DEBUG(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__)",
        "+",
        " /* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */",
        " /*                              Internal structs                               */",
        " /* \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */"

54. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/project/src/module_69.txt",
  "limit": 60
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "```c\n/*\n * MercuryMonolith Commerce Hub\n * Module 69  \u2013  Response Cache Manager\n *\n * Description:\n *   Thread-safe in-memory response cache with TTL, LRU eviction,\n *   structured logging, and Prometheus-compatible metrics export.\n *\n *   This component is used by the API-gateway layer to accelerate\n *   frequently requested REST / GraphQL queries while retaining\n *   fine-grained invalidation hooks for the service & repository\n *   layers.  It is deliberately implemented without third-party\n *   dependencies to keep the monolith self-contained.\n *\n * Author:  MercuryMonolith Core Team\n * License: Apache-2.0\n */\n\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <stdbool.h>\n#include <stdatomic.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n\n/* =========================  Configuration  ========================= */\n\n/* Maximum number of cached objects (soft limit, eviction is best-effort). */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_CAPACITY\n#  define MM_CACHE_CAPACITY 4096\n#endif\n\n/* Default TTL in seconds unless overridden by caller. */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL\n#  define MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL 60\n#endif\n\n/* Logging facility \u2014 can be overridden by defining MM_CACHE_LOG(level, fmt, ...) */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_LOG\n#  define MM_CACHE_LOG(level, fmt, ...) \\\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Cache:%s] \" fmt \"\\n\", level, ##__VA_ARGS__)\n#endif\n\n/* Hash map backend \u2014 simple open addressing; power-of-two buckets. */\n#define BUCKET_COUNT 8192u   /* Must be power-of-two for fast masking. */\n#define BUCKET_MASK  (BUCKET_COUNT - 1)\n\n/* =========================  Data Types  ========================= */\n\ntypedef struct _cache_entry {\n    /* Key & data */\n    char            *key;          /* NULL-terminated */\n    uint8_t         *blob;         /* Arbitrary opaque payload */\n    size_t           blob_len;\n    time_t           expiry;       /* Absolute UTC seconds */\n\n    /* LRU chain */",
    "filePath": "/workspace/project/src/module_69.txt",
    "numLines": 60,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 534
  },
  "type": "text"
}

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "    mm_cache_t *cache = calloc(1, sizeof(mm_cache_t));\n    if (!cache)\n    {\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"ERROR\", \"Failed to allocate cache\");\n        return NULL;\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_init(&cache->mtx, NULL);\n    return cache;\n}\n\nvoid\nmm_cache_destroy(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return;\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    for (size_t i = 0; i < BUCKET_COUNT; ++i)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *cur = cache->buckets[i];\n        while (cur)\n        {\n            cache_entry_t *nx = cur->hnext;\n            free(cur->key);\n            free(cur->blob);\n            free(cur);\n            cur = nx;\n        }\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n    pthread_mutex_destroy(&cache->mtx);",
    "filePath": "/workspace/project/src/module_69.txt",
    "numLines": 30,
    "startLine": 140,
    "totalLines": 534

  "oldString": "#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <stdbool.h>\n#include <stdatomic.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n\n/* =========================  Configuration  ========================= */\n\n/* Maximum number of cached objects (soft limit, eviction is best-effort). */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_CAPACITY\n#  define MM_CACHE_CAPACITY 4096\n#endif\n\n/* Default TTL in seconds unless overridden by caller. */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL\n#  define MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL 60\n#endif\n\n/* Logging facility \u2014 can be overridden by defining MM_CACHE_LOG(level, fmt, ...) */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_LOG\n#  define MM_CACHE_LOG(level, fmt, ...) \\\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Cache:%s] \" fmt \"\\n\", level, ##__VA_ARGS__)\n#endif",
  "originalFile": "```c\n/*\n * MercuryMonolith Commerce Hub\n * Module 69  \u2013  Response Cache Manager\n *\n * Description:\n *   Thread-safe in-memory response cache with TTL, LRU eviction,\n *   structured logging, and Prometheus-compatible metrics export.\n *\n *   This component is used by the API-gateway layer to accelerate\n *   frequently requested REST / GraphQL queries while retaining\n *   fine-grained invalidation hooks for the service & repository\n *   layers.  It is deliberately implemented without third-party\n *   dependencies to keep the monolith self-contained.\n *\n * Author:  MercuryMonolith Core Team\n * License: Apache-2.0\n */\n\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <stdbool.h>\n#include <stdatomic.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n\n/* =========================  Configuration  ========================= */\n\n/* Maximum number of cached objects (soft limit, eviction is best-effort). */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_CAPACITY\n#  define MM_CACHE_CAPACITY 4096\n#endif\n\n/* Default TTL in seconds unless overridden by caller. */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL\n#  define MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL 60\n#endif\n\n/* Logging facility \u2014 can be overridden by defining MM_CACHE_LOG(level, fmt, ...) */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_LOG\n#  define MM_CACHE_LOG(level, fmt, ...) \\\n        fprintf(stderr, \"[Cache:%s] \" fmt \"\\n\", level, ##__VA_ARGS__)\n#endif\n\n/* Hash map backend \u2014 simple open addressing; power-of-two buckets. */\n#define BUCKET_COUNT 8192u   /* Must be power-of-two for fast masking. */\n#define BUCKET_MASK  (BUCKET_COUNT - 1)\n\n/* =========================  Data Types  ========================= */\n\ntypedef struct _cache_entry {\n    /* Key & data */\n    char            *key;          /* NULL-terminated */\n    uint8_t         *blob;         /* Arbitrary opaque payload */\n    size_t           blob_len;\n    time_t           expiry;       /* Absolute UTC seconds */\n\n    /* LRU chain */\n    struct _cache_entry *prev;\n    struct _cache_entry *next;\n\n    /* Hash chain */\n    struct _cache_entry *hnext;\n} cache_entry_t;\n\ntypedef struct\n{\n    cache_entry_t  *buckets[BUCKET_COUNT];\n    cache_entry_t  *lru_head;      /* Most recently used */\n    cache_entry_t  *lru_tail;      /* Least recently used */\n\n    size_t          size;          /* # of live entries */\n    pthread_mutex_t mtx;\n\n    /* Prometheus metrics (atomic for fast reads) */\n    atomic_uint_least64_t hits;\n    atomic_uint_least64_t misses;\n    atomic_uint_least64_t evictions;\n} mm_cache_t;\n\n/* =========================  Utilities  ========================= */\n\nstatic inline uint32_t\nfnv1a_32(const char *data)\n{\n    uint32_t hash = 2166136261u;\n    while (*data)\n    {\n        hash ^= (uint8_t)(*data++);\n        hash *= 16777619u;\n    }\n    return hash;\n}\n\n/* =========================  Core Primitives  ========================= */\n\nstatic void\nlru_promote(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    /* Already at head? */\n    if (cache->lru_head == ce) return;\n\n    /* Detach */\n    if (ce->prev) ce->prev->next = ce->next;\n    if (ce->next) ce->next->prev = ce->prev;\n\n    if (cache->lru_tail == ce)\n        cache->lru_tail = ce->prev;\n\n    /* Insert at head */\n    ce->prev          = NULL;\n    ce->next          = cache->lru_head;\n    if (cache->lru_head)\n        cache->lru_head->prev = ce;\n    cache->lru_head   = ce;\n\n    if (!cache->lru_tail)\n        cache->lru_tail = ce;\n}\n\nstatic void\nlru_append(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    ce->prev = NULL;\n    ce->next = cache->lru_head;\n    if (cache->lru_head)\n        cache->lru_head->prev = ce;\n    cache->lru_head = ce;\n    if (!cache->lru_tail)\n        cache->lru_tail = ce;\n}\n\n/* =========================  Public API  ========================= */\n\nmm_cache_t *\nmm_cache_create(void)\n{\n    mm_cache_t *cache = calloc(1, sizeof(mm_cache_t));\n    if (!cache)\n    {\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"ERROR\", \"Failed to allocate cache\");\n        return NULL;\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_init(&cache->mtx, NULL);\n    return cache;\n}\n\nvoid\nmm_cache_destroy(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return;\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    for (size_t i = 0; i < BUCKET_COUNT; ++i)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *cur = cache->buckets[i];\n        while (cur)\n        {\n            cache_entry_t *nx = cur->hnext;\n            free(cur->key);\n            free(cur->blob);\n            free(cur);\n            cur = nx;\n        }\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n    pthread_mutex_destroy(&cache->mtx);\n    free(cache);\n}\n\nstatic void\nhash_insert(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    uint32_t h = fnv1a_32(ce->key) & BUCKET_MASK;\n    ce->hnext = cache->buckets[h];\n    cache->buckets[h] = ce;\n}\n\nstatic cache_entry_t *\nhash_lookup(mm_cache_t *cache, const char *key)\n{\n    uint32_t h = fnv1a_32(key) & BUCKET_MASK;\n    cache_entry_t *cur = cache->buckets[h];\n    while (cur)\n    {\n        if (strcmp(cur->key, key) == 0)\n            return cur;\n        cur = cur->hnext;\n    }\n    return NULL;\n}\n\nstatic void\nhash_remove(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    uint32_t h = fnv1a_32(ce->key) & BUCKET_MASK;\n    cache_entry_t **cur = &cache->buckets[h];\n    while (*cur)\n    {\n        if (*cur == ce)\n        {\n            *cur = ce->hnext;\n            return;\n        }\n        cur = &(*cur)->hnext;\n    }\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_put:\n *   Stores (or overwrites) a payload under the specified key.\n *   `ttl_sec` of 0 means \"use default TTL\".\n *\n *   The payload is copied; the caller retains ownership of the input buffer.\n */\nbool\nmm_cache_put(mm_cache_t *cache,\n             const char *key,\n             const uint8_t *payload,\n             size_t len,\n             uint32_t ttl_sec)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key || !payload || len == 0)\n        return false;\n\n    bool replaced = false;\n    time_t now    = time(NULL);\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    cache_entry_t *ce = hash_lookup(cache, key);\n    if (ce)\n    {\n        /* Replace */\n        free(ce->blob);\n        ce->blob     = malloc(len);\n        if (!ce->blob)\n        {\n            pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n            return false;\n        }\n        memcpy(ce->blob, payload, len);\n        ce->blob_len = len;\n        ce->expiry   = now + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL);\n        replaced     = true;\n\n        lru_promote(cache, ce);\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        /* Make new entry */\n        ce = calloc(1, sizeof(cache_entry_t));\n        if (!ce)\n        {\n            pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n            return false;\n        }\n        ce->key  = strdup(key);\n        ce->blob = malloc(len);\n        if (!ce->key || !ce->blob)\n        {\n            free(ce->key);\n            free(ce->blob);\n            free(ce);\n            pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n            return false;\n        }\n        memcpy(ce->blob, payload, len);\n        ce->blob_len = len;\n        ce->expiry   = now + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL);\n\n        hash_insert(cache, ce);\n        lru_append(cache, ce);\n        cache->size++;\n    }\n\n    /* Evict if over capacity */\n    while (cache->size > MM_CACHE_CAPACITY && cache->lru_tail)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *victim = cache->lru_tail;\n\n        if (victim->prev)\n            victim->prev->next = NULL;\n        cache->lru_tail = victim->prev;\n        if (cache->lru_head == victim)\n            cache->lru_head = NULL;\n\n        hash_remove(cache, victim);\n\n        free(victim->key);\n        free(victim->blob);\n        free(victim);\n\n        cache->size--;\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"%s entry for key='%s' (ttl=%us)\",\n                 replaced ? \"Updated\" : \"Cached\", key,\n                 (unsigned)(ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL));\n    return true;\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_get:\n *   Returns a malloc'd copy of the cached payload (caller responsible\n *   for free()) or NULL if not found / expired.\n */\nuint8_t *\nmm_cache_get(mm_cache_t *cache,\n             const char *key,\n             size_t *out_len)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key) return NULL;\n\n    uint8_t *copy = NULL;\n    time_t   now  = time(NULL);\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    cache_entry_t *ce = hash_lookup(cache, key);\n\n    if (ce && ce->expiry >= now)\n    {\n        /* Hit */\n        copy = malloc(ce->blob_len);\n        if (copy)\n        {\n            memcpy(copy, ce->blob, ce->blob_len);\n            if (out_len) *out_len = ce->blob_len;\n        }\n        lru_promote(cache, ce);\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->hits, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        /* Miss or expired */\n        if (ce)\n        {\n            /* Remove expired entry */\n            if (ce->prev) ce->prev->next = ce->next;\n            if (ce->next) ce->next->prev = ce->prev;\n            if (cache->lru_head == ce) cache->lru_head = ce->next;\n            if (cache->lru_tail == ce) cache->lru_tail = ce->prev;\n\n            hash_remove(cache, ce);\n            free(ce->key);\n            free(ce->blob);\n            free(ce);\n            cache->size--;\n\n            atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n        }\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->misses, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    return copy;\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_invalidate:\n *   Removes a single cache entry if present.\n */\nbool\nmm_cache_invalidate(mm_cache_t *cache, const char *key)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key) return false;\n\n    bool removed = false;\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    cache_entry_t *ce = hash_lookup(cache, key);\n    if (ce)\n    {\n        /* Detach from LRU */\n        if (ce->prev) ce->prev->next = ce->next;\n        if (ce->next) ce->next->prev = ce->prev;\n        if (cache->lru_head == ce) cache->lru_head = ce->next;\n        if (cache->lru_tail == ce) cache->lru_tail = ce->prev;\n\n        /* Hash remove */\n        hash_remove(cache, ce);\n\n        free(ce->key);\n        free(ce->blob);\n        free(ce);\n\n        cache->size--;\n        removed = true;\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    if (removed)\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"Invalidated key='%s'\", key);\n    else\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"DEBUG\", \"Invalidate request for missing key='%s'\", key);\n\n    return removed;\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_flush_all:\n *   Invalidates ALL entries in the cache (use sparingly).\n */\nvoid\nmm_cache_flush_all(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return;\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    for (size_t i = 0; i < BUCKET_COUNT; ++i)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *cur = cache->buckets[i];\n        while (cur)\n        {\n            cache_entry_t *nx = cur->hnext;\n            free(cur->key);\n            free(cur->blob);\n            free(cur);\n            cur = nx;\n        }\n        cache->buckets[i] = NULL;\n    }\n    cache->lru_head = cache->lru_tail = NULL;\n    cache->size     = 0;\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"Cache flushed\");\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_prometheus_export:\n *   Exports cache metrics as a newline-delimited Prometheus text\n *   exposition format block.  The caller must free() the returned\n *   string when done.\n *\n *   Example output:\n *     # TYPE mm_cache_hits_total counter\n *     mm_cache_hits_total 1024\n *     ...\n */\nchar *\nmm_cache_prometheus_export(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return NULL;\n\n    /* We know exactly how many lines we have \u2014 pre-size buffer. */\n    const char *tpl =\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_hits_total Total number of cache hits\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_hits_total counter\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_hits_total %lu\\n\"\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_misses_total Total number of cache misses\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_misses_total counter\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_misses_total %lu\\n\"\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_evictions_total Total number of evictions/expirations\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_evictions_total counter\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_evictions_total %lu\\n\"\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_entries Gauge of current cache entries\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_entries gauge\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_entries %zu\\n\";\n\n    size_t sz = snprintf(NULL, 0, tpl,\n                         (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->hits),\n                         (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->misses),\n                         (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->evictions),\n                         cache->size);\n\n    char *buf = malloc(sz + 1);\n    if (!buf) return NULL;\n\n    snprintf(buf, sz + 1, tpl,\n             (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->hits),\n             (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->misses),\n             (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->evictions),\n             cache->size);\n\n    return buf;\n}\n\n/* =========================  Periodic Maintenance  ========================= */\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_purge_expired:\n *   Scans and removes expired entries (O(N) worst-case).  Intended to be\n *   triggered by a housekeeping thread every few seconds.\n */\nsize_t\nmm_cache_purge_expired(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return 0;\n\n    size_t purged = 0;\n    time_t now    = time(NULL);\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    cache_entry_t *cur = cache->lru_tail; /* Start from cold tail */\n    while (cur)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *prev = cur->prev;\n\n        if (cur->expiry < now)\n        {\n            /* Detach from LRU */\n            if (cur->prev) cur->prev->next = cur->next;\n            if (cur->next) cur->next->prev = cur->prev;\n            if (cache->lru_head == cur) cache->lru_head = cur->next;\n            if (cache->lru_tail == cur) cache->lru_tail = cur->prev;\n\n            /* Hash remove */\n            hash_remove(cache, cur);\n\n            free(cur->key);\n            free(cur->blob);\n            free(cur);\n\n            cache->size--;\n            purged++;\n            atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n        }\n        cur = prev;\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    if (purged)\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"Purged %zu expired entries\", purged);\n\n    return purged;\n}\n```",

  "oldString": "        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"ERROR\", \"Failed to allocate cache\");",
  "originalFile": "```c\n/*\n * MercuryMonolith Commerce Hub\n * Module 69  \u2013  Response Cache Manager\n *\n * Description:\n *   Thread-safe in-memory response cache with TTL, LRU eviction,\n *   structured logging, and Prometheus-compatible metrics export.\n *\n *   This component is used by the API-gateway layer to accelerate\n *   frequently requested REST / GraphQL queries while retaining\n *   fine-grained invalidation hooks for the service & repository\n *   layers.  It is deliberately implemented without third-party\n *   dependencies to keep the monolith self-contained.\n *\n * Author:  MercuryMonolith Core Team\n * License: Apache-2.0\n */\n\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <stdbool.h>\n#include <stdatomic.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n\n#include \"logging.h\"\n\n/* =========================  Configuration  ========================= */\n\n/* Maximum number of cached objects (soft limit, eviction is best-effort). */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_CAPACITY\n#  define MM_CACHE_CAPACITY 4096\n#endif\n\n/* Default TTL in seconds unless overridden by caller. */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL\n#  define MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL 60\n#endif\n\n/* Hash map backend \u2014 simple open addressing; power-of-two buckets. */\n#define BUCKET_COUNT 8192u   /* Must be power-of-two for fast masking. */\n#define BUCKET_MASK  (BUCKET_COUNT - 1)\n\n/* =========================  Data Types  ========================= */\n\ntypedef struct _cache_entry {\n    /* Key & data */\n    char            *key;          /* NULL-terminated */\n    uint8_t         *blob;         /* Arbitrary opaque payload */\n    size_t           blob_len;\n    time_t           expiry;       /* Absolute UTC seconds */\n\n    /* LRU chain */\n    struct _cache_entry *prev;\n    struct _cache_entry *next;\n\n    /* Hash chain */\n    struct _cache_entry *hnext;\n} cache_entry_t;\n\ntypedef struct\n{\n    cache_entry_t  *buckets[BUCKET_COUNT];\n    cache_entry_t  *lru_head;      /* Most recently used */\n    cache_entry_t  *lru_tail;      /* Least recently used */\n\n    size_t          size;          /* # of live entries */\n    pthread_mutex_t mtx;\n\n    /* Prometheus metrics (atomic for fast reads) */\n    atomic_uint_least64_t hits;\n    atomic_uint_least64_t misses;\n    atomic_uint_least64_t evictions;\n} mm_cache_t;\n\n/* =========================  Utilities  ========================= */\n\nstatic inline uint32_t\nfnv1a_32(const char *data)\n{\n    uint32_t hash = 2166136261u;\n    while (*data)\n    {\n        hash ^= (uint8_t)(*data++);\n        hash *= 16777619u;\n    }\n    return hash;\n}\n\n/* =========================  Core Primitives  ========================= */\n\nstatic void\nlru_promote(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    /* Already at head? */\n    if (cache->lru_head == ce) return;\n\n    /* Detach */\n    if (ce->prev) ce->prev->next = ce->next;\n    if (ce->next) ce->next->prev = ce->prev;\n\n    if (cache->lru_tail == ce)\n        cache->lru_tail = ce->prev;\n\n    /* Insert at head */\n    ce->prev          = NULL;\n    ce->next          = cache->lru_head;\n    if (cache->lru_head)\n        cache->lru_head->prev = ce;\n    cache->lru_head   = ce;\n\n    if (!cache->lru_tail)\n        cache->lru_tail = ce;\n}\n\nstatic void\nlru_append(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    ce->prev = NULL;\n    ce->next = cache->lru_head;\n    if (cache->lru_head)\n        cache->lru_head->prev = ce;\n    cache->lru_head = ce;\n    if (!cache->lru_tail)\n        cache->lru_tail = ce;\n}\n\n/* =========================  Public API  ========================= */\n\nmm_cache_t *\nmm_cache_create(void)\n{\n    mm_cache_t *cache = calloc(1, sizeof(mm_cache_t));\n    if (!cache)\n    {\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"ERROR\", \"Failed to allocate cache\");\n        return NULL;\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_init(&cache->mtx, NULL);\n    return cache;\n}\n\nvoid\nmm_cache_destroy(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return;\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    for (size_t i = 0; i < BUCKET_COUNT; ++i)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *cur = cache->buckets[i];\n        while (cur)\n        {\n            cache_entry_t *nx = cur->hnext;\n            free(cur->key);\n            free(cur->blob);\n            free(cur);\n            cur = nx;\n        }\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n    pthread_mutex_destroy(&cache->mtx);\n    free(cache);\n}\n\nstatic void\nhash_insert(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    uint32_t h = fnv1a_32(ce->key) & BUCKET_MASK;\n    ce->hnext = cache->buckets[h];\n    cache->buckets[h] = ce;\n}\n\nstatic cache_entry_t *\nhash_lookup(mm_cache_t *cache, const char *key)\n{\n    uint32_t h = fnv1a_32(key) & BUCKET_MASK;\n    cache_entry_t *cur = cache->buckets[h];\n    while (cur)\n    {\n        if (strcmp(cur->key, key) == 0)\n            return cur;\n        cur = cur->hnext;\n    }\n    return NULL;\n}\n\nstatic void\nhash_remove(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    uint32_t h = fnv1a_32(ce->key) & BUCKET_MASK;\n    cache_entry_t **cur = &cache->buckets[h];\n    while (*cur)\n    {\n        if (*cur == ce)\n        {\n            *cur = ce->hnext;\n            return;\n        }\n        cur = &(*cur)->hnext;\n    }\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_put:\n *   Stores (or overwrites) a payload under the specified key.\n *   `ttl_sec` of 0 means \"use default TTL\".\n *\n *   The payload is copied; the caller retains ownership of the input buffer.\n */\nbool\nmm_cache_put(mm_cache_t *cache,\n             const char *key,\n             const uint8_t *payload,\n             size_t len,\n             uint32_t ttl_sec)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key || !payload || len == 0)\n        return false;\n\n    bool replaced = false;\n    time_t now    = time(NULL);\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    cache_entry_t *ce = hash_lookup(cache, key);\n    if (ce)\n    {\n        /* Replace */\n        free(ce->blob);\n        ce->blob     = malloc(len);\n        if (!ce->blob)\n        {\n            pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n            return false;\n        }\n        memcpy(ce->blob, payload, len);\n        ce->blob_len = len;\n        ce->expiry   = now + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL);\n        replaced     = true;\n\n        lru_promote(cache, ce);\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        /* Make new entry */\n        ce = calloc(1, sizeof(cache_entry_t));\n        if (!ce)\n        {\n            pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n            return false;\n        }\n        ce->key  = strdup(key);\n        ce->blob = malloc(len);\n        if (!ce->key || !ce->blob)\n        {\n            free(ce->key);\n            free(ce->blob);\n            free(ce);\n            pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n            return false;\n        }\n        memcpy(ce->blob, payload, len);\n        ce->blob_len = len;\n        ce->expiry   = now + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL);\n\n        hash_insert(cache, ce);\n        lru_append(cache, ce);\n        cache->size++;\n    }\n\n    /* Evict if over capacity */\n    while (cache->size > MM_CACHE_CAPACITY && cache->lru_tail)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *victim = cache->lru_tail;\n\n        if (victim->prev)\n            victim->prev->next = NULL;\n        cache->lru_tail = victim->prev;\n        if (cache->lru_head == victim)\n            cache->lru_head = NULL;\n\n        hash_remove(cache, victim);\n\n        free(victim->key);\n        free(victim->blob);\n        free(victim);\n\n        cache->size--;\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"%s entry for key='%s' (ttl=%us)\",\n                 replaced ? \"Updated\" : \"Cached\", key,\n                 (unsigned)(ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL));\n    return true;\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_get:\n *   Returns a malloc'd copy of the cached payload (caller responsible\n *   for free()) or NULL if not found / expired.\n */\nuint8_t *\nmm_cache_get(mm_cache_t *cache,\n             const char *key,\n             size_t *out_len)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key) return NULL;\n\n    uint8_t *copy = NULL;\n    time_t   now  = time(NULL);\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    cache_entry_t *ce = hash_lookup(cache, key);\n\n    if (ce && ce->expiry >= now)\n    {\n        /* Hit */\n        copy = malloc(ce->blob_len);\n        if (copy)\n        {\n            memcpy(copy, ce->blob, ce->blob_len);\n            if (out_len) *out_len = ce->blob_len;\n        }\n        lru_promote(cache, ce);\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->hits, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        /* Miss or expired */\n        if (ce)\n        {\n            /* Remove expired entry */\n            if (ce->prev) ce->prev->next = ce->next;\n            if (ce->next) ce->next->prev = ce->prev;\n            if (cache->lru_head == ce) cache->lru_head = ce->next;\n            if (cache->lru_tail == ce) cache->lru_tail = ce->prev;\n\n            hash_remove(cache, ce);\n            free(ce->key);\n            free(ce->blob);\n            free(ce);\n            cache->size--;\n\n            atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n        }\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->misses, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    return copy;\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_invalidate:\n *   Removes a single cache entry if present.\n */\nbool\nmm_cache_invalidate(mm_cache_t *cache, const char *key)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key) return false;\n\n    bool removed = false;\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    cache_entry_t *ce = hash_lookup(cache, key);\n    if (ce)\n    {\n        /* Detach from LRU */\n        if (ce->prev) ce->prev->next = ce->next;\n        if (ce->next) ce->next->prev = ce->prev;\n        if (cache->lru_head == ce) cache->lru_head = ce->next;\n        if (cache->lru_tail == ce) cache->lru_tail = ce->prev;\n\n        /* Hash remove */\n        hash_remove(cache, ce);\n\n        free(ce->key);\n        free(ce->blob);\n        free(ce);\n\n        cache->size--;\n        removed = true;\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    if (removed)\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"Invalidated key='%s'\", key);\n    else\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"DEBUG\", \"Invalidate request for missing key='%s'\", key);\n\n    return removed;\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_flush_all:\n *   Invalidates ALL entries in the cache (use sparingly).\n */\nvoid\nmm_cache_flush_all(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return;\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    for (size_t i = 0; i < BUCKET_COUNT; ++i)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *cur = cache->buckets[i];\n        while (cur)\n        {\n            cache_entry_t *nx = cur->hnext;\n            free(cur->key);\n            free(cur->blob);\n            free(cur);\n            cur = nx;\n        }\n        cache->buckets[i] = NULL;\n    }\n    cache->lru_head = cache->lru_tail = NULL;\n    cache->size     = 0;\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"Cache flushed\");\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_prometheus_export:\n *   Exports cache metrics as a newline-delimited Prometheus text\n *   exposition format block.  The caller must free() the returned\n *   string when done.\n *\n *   Example output:\n *     # TYPE mm_cache_hits_total counter\n *     mm_cache_hits_total 1024\n *     ...\n */\nchar *\nmm_cache_prometheus_export(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return NULL;\n\n    /* We know exactly how many lines we have \u2014 pre-size buffer. */\n    const char *tpl =\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_hits_total Total number of cache hits\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_hits_total counter\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_hits_total %lu\\n\"\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_misses_total Total number of cache misses\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_misses_total counter\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_misses_total %lu\\n\"\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_evictions_total Total number of evictions/expirations\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_evictions_total counter\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_evictions_total %lu\\n\"\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_entries Gauge of current cache entries\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_entries gauge\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_entries %zu\\n\";\n\n    size_t sz = snprintf(NULL, 0, tpl,\n                         (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->hits),\n                         (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->misses),\n                         (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->evictions),\n                         cache->size);\n\n    char *buf = malloc(sz + 1);\n    if (!buf) return NULL;\n\n    snprintf(buf, sz + 1, tpl,\n             (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->hits),\n             (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->misses),\n             (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->evictions),\n             cache->size);\n\n    return buf;\n}\n\n/* =========================  Periodic Maintenance  ========================= */\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_purge_expired:\n *   Scans and removes expired entries (O(N) worst-case).  Intended to be\n *   triggered by a housekeeping thread every few seconds.\n */\nsize_t\nmm_cache_purge_expired(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return 0;\n\n    size_t purged = 0;\n    time_t now    = time(NULL);\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    cache_entry_t *cur = cache->lru_tail; /* Start from cold tail */\n    while (cur)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *prev = cur->prev;\n\n        if (cur->expiry < now)\n        {\n            /* Detach from LRU */\n            if (cur->prev) cur->prev->next = cur->next;\n            if (cur->next) cur->next->prev = cur->prev;\n            if (cache->lru_head == cur) cache->lru_head = cur->next;\n            if (cache->lru_tail == cur) cache->lru_tail = cur->prev;\n\n            /* Hash remove */\n            hash_remove(cache, cur);\n\n            free(cur->key);\n            free(cur->blob);\n            free(cur);\n\n            cache->size--;\n            purged++;\n            atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n        }\n        cur = prev;\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    if (purged)\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"Purged %zu expired entries\", purged);\n\n    return purged;\n}\n```",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [

60. Edit @ -
Input
{

  "old_string": "    MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"%s entry for key='%s' (ttl=%us)\",\n                 replaced ? \"Updated\" : \"Cached\", key,\n                 (unsigned)(ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL));",

Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/project/src/module_69.txt",
  "newString": "    LOG_INFO(\"%s entry for key='%s' (ttl=%us)\",\n             replaced ? \"Updated\" : \"Cached\", key,\n             (unsigned)(ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL));",
  "oldString": "    MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"%s entry for key='%s' (ttl=%us)\",\n                 replaced ? \"Updated\" : \"Cached\", key,\n                 (unsigned)(ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL));",
  "originalFile": "```c\n/*\n * MercuryMonolith Commerce Hub\n * Module 69  \u2013  Response Cache Manager\n *\n * Description:\n *   Thread-safe in-memory response cache with TTL, LRU eviction,\n *   structured logging, and Prometheus-compatible metrics export.\n *\n *   This component is used by the API-gateway layer to accelerate\n *   frequently requested REST / GraphQL queries while retaining\n *   fine-grained invalidation hooks for the service & repository\n *   layers.  It is deliberately implemented without third-party\n *   dependencies to keep the monolith self-contained.\n *\n * Author:  MercuryMonolith Core Team\n * License: Apache-2.0\n */\n\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <stdbool.h>\n#include <stdatomic.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n\n#include \"logging.h\"\n\n/* =========================  Configuration  ========================= */\n\n/* Maximum number of cached objects (soft limit, eviction is best-effort). */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_CAPACITY\n#  define MM_CACHE_CAPACITY 4096\n#endif\n\n/* Default TTL in seconds unless overridden by caller. */\n#ifndef MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL\n#  define MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL 60\n#endif\n\n/* Hash map backend \u2014 simple open addressing; power-of-two buckets. */\n#define BUCKET_COUNT 8192u   /* Must be power-of-two for fast masking. */\n#define BUCKET_MASK  (BUCKET_COUNT - 1)\n\n/* =========================  Data Types  ========================= */\n\ntypedef struct _cache_entry {\n    /* Key & data */\n    char            *key;          /* NULL-terminated */\n    uint8_t         *blob;         /* Arbitrary opaque payload */\n    size_t           blob_len;\n    time_t           expiry;       /* Absolute UTC seconds */\n\n    /* LRU chain */\n    struct _cache_entry *prev;\n    struct _cache_entry *next;\n\n    /* Hash chain */\n    struct _cache_entry *hnext;\n} cache_entry_t;\n\ntypedef struct\n{\n    cache_entry_t  *buckets[BUCKET_COUNT];\n    cache_entry_t  *lru_head;      /* Most recently used */\n    cache_entry_t  *lru_tail;      /* Least recently used */\n\n    size_t          size;          /* # of live entries */\n    pthread_mutex_t mtx;\n\n    /* Prometheus metrics (atomic for fast reads) */\n    atomic_uint_least64_t hits;\n    atomic_uint_least64_t misses;\n    atomic_uint_least64_t evictions;\n} mm_cache_t;\n\n/* =========================  Utilities  ========================= */\n\nstatic inline uint32_t\nfnv1a_32(const char *data)\n{\n    uint32_t hash = 2166136261u;\n    while (*data)\n    {\n        hash ^= (uint8_t)(*data++);\n        hash *= 16777619u;\n    }\n    return hash;\n}\n\n/* =========================  Core Primitives  ========================= */\n\nstatic void\nlru_promote(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    /* Already at head? */\n    if (cache->lru_head == ce) return;\n\n    /* Detach */\n    if (ce->prev) ce->prev->next = ce->next;\n    if (ce->next) ce->next->prev = ce->prev;\n\n    if (cache->lru_tail == ce)\n        cache->lru_tail = ce->prev;\n\n    /* Insert at head */\n    ce->prev          = NULL;\n    ce->next          = cache->lru_head;\n    if (cache->lru_head)\n        cache->lru_head->prev = ce;\n    cache->lru_head   = ce;\n\n    if (!cache->lru_tail)\n        cache->lru_tail = ce;\n}\n\nstatic void\nlru_append(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    ce->prev = NULL;\n    ce->next = cache->lru_head;\n    if (cache->lru_head)\n        cache->lru_head->prev = ce;\n    cache->lru_head = ce;\n    if (!cache->lru_tail)\n        cache->lru_tail = ce;\n}\n\n/* =========================  Public API  ========================= */\n\nmm_cache_t *\nmm_cache_create(void)\n{\n    mm_cache_t *cache = calloc(1, sizeof(mm_cache_t));\n    if (!cache)\n    {\n        LOG_ERROR(\"Failed to allocate cache\");\n        return NULL;\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_init(&cache->mtx, NULL);\n    return cache;\n}\n\nvoid\nmm_cache_destroy(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return;\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    for (size_t i = 0; i < BUCKET_COUNT; ++i)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *cur = cache->buckets[i];\n        while (cur)\n        {\n            cache_entry_t *nx = cur->hnext;\n            free(cur->key);\n            free(cur->blob);\n            free(cur);\n            cur = nx;\n        }\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n    pthread_mutex_destroy(&cache->mtx);\n    free(cache);\n}\n\nstatic void\nhash_insert(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    uint32_t h = fnv1a_32(ce->key) & BUCKET_MASK;\n    ce->hnext = cache->buckets[h];\n    cache->buckets[h] = ce;\n}\n\nstatic cache_entry_t *\nhash_lookup(mm_cache_t *cache, const char *key)\n{\n    uint32_t h = fnv1a_32(key) & BUCKET_MASK;\n    cache_entry_t *cur = cache->buckets[h];\n    while (cur)\n    {\n        if (strcmp(cur->key, key) == 0)\n            return cur;\n        cur = cur->hnext;\n    }\n    return NULL;\n}\n\nstatic void\nhash_remove(mm_cache_t *cache, cache_entry_t *ce)\n{\n    uint32_t h = fnv1a_32(ce->key) & BUCKET_MASK;\n    cache_entry_t **cur = &cache->buckets[h];\n    while (*cur)\n    {\n        if (*cur == ce)\n        {\n            *cur = ce->hnext;\n            return;\n        }\n        cur = &(*cur)->hnext;\n    }\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_put:\n *   Stores (or overwrites) a payload under the specified key.\n *   `ttl_sec` of 0 means \"use default TTL\".\n *\n *   The payload is copied; the caller retains ownership of the input buffer.\n */\nbool\nmm_cache_put(mm_cache_t *cache,\n             const char *key,\n             const uint8_t *payload,\n             size_t len,\n             uint32_t ttl_sec)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key || !payload || len == 0)\n        return false;\n\n    bool replaced = false;\n    time_t now    = time(NULL);\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    cache_entry_t *ce = hash_lookup(cache, key);\n    if (ce)\n    {\n        /* Replace */\n        free(ce->blob);\n        ce->blob     = malloc(len);\n        if (!ce->blob)\n        {\n            pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n            return false;\n        }\n        memcpy(ce->blob, payload, len);\n        ce->blob_len = len;\n        ce->expiry   = now + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL);\n        replaced     = true;\n\n        lru_promote(cache, ce);\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        /* Make new entry */\n        ce = calloc(1, sizeof(cache_entry_t));\n        if (!ce)\n        {\n            pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n            return false;\n        }\n        ce->key  = strdup(key);\n        ce->blob = malloc(len);\n        if (!ce->key || !ce->blob)\n        {\n            free(ce->key);\n            free(ce->blob);\n            free(ce);\n            pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n            return false;\n        }\n        memcpy(ce->blob, payload, len);\n        ce->blob_len = len;\n        ce->expiry   = now + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL);\n\n        hash_insert(cache, ce);\n        lru_append(cache, ce);\n        cache->size++;\n    }\n\n    /* Evict if over capacity */\n    while (cache->size > MM_CACHE_CAPACITY && cache->lru_tail)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *victim = cache->lru_tail;\n\n        if (victim->prev)\n            victim->prev->next = NULL;\n        cache->lru_tail = victim->prev;\n        if (cache->lru_head == victim)\n            cache->lru_head = NULL;\n\n        hash_remove(cache, victim);\n\n        free(victim->key);\n        free(victim->blob);\n        free(victim);\n\n        cache->size--;\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"%s entry for key='%s' (ttl=%us)\",\n                 replaced ? \"Updated\" : \"Cached\", key,\n                 (unsigned)(ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : MM_CACHE_DEFAULT_TTL));\n    return true;\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_get:\n *   Returns a malloc'd copy of the cached payload (caller responsible\n *   for free()) or NULL if not found / expired.\n */\nuint8_t *\nmm_cache_get(mm_cache_t *cache,\n             const char *key,\n             size_t *out_len)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key) return NULL;\n\n    uint8_t *copy = NULL;\n    time_t   now  = time(NULL);\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    cache_entry_t *ce = hash_lookup(cache, key);\n\n    if (ce && ce->expiry >= now)\n    {\n        /* Hit */\n        copy = malloc(ce->blob_len);\n        if (copy)\n        {\n            memcpy(copy, ce->blob, ce->blob_len);\n            if (out_len) *out_len = ce->blob_len;\n        }\n        lru_promote(cache, ce);\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->hits, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        /* Miss or expired */\n        if (ce)\n        {\n            /* Remove expired entry */\n            if (ce->prev) ce->prev->next = ce->next;\n            if (ce->next) ce->next->prev = ce->prev;\n            if (cache->lru_head == ce) cache->lru_head = ce->next;\n            if (cache->lru_tail == ce) cache->lru_tail = ce->prev;\n\n            hash_remove(cache, ce);\n            free(ce->key);\n            free(ce->blob);\n            free(ce);\n            cache->size--;\n\n            atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n        }\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->misses, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    return copy;\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_invalidate:\n *   Removes a single cache entry if present.\n */\nbool\nmm_cache_invalidate(mm_cache_t *cache, const char *key)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key) return false;\n\n    bool removed = false;\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    cache_entry_t *ce = hash_lookup(cache, key);\n    if (ce)\n    {\n        /* Detach from LRU */\n        if (ce->prev) ce->prev->next = ce->next;\n        if (ce->next) ce->next->prev = ce->prev;\n        if (cache->lru_head == ce) cache->lru_head = ce->next;\n        if (cache->lru_tail == ce) cache->lru_tail = ce->prev;\n\n        /* Hash remove */\n        hash_remove(cache, ce);\n\n        free(ce->key);\n        free(ce->blob);\n        free(ce);\n\n        cache->size--;\n        removed = true;\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    if (removed)\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"Invalidated key='%s'\", key);\n    else\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"DEBUG\", \"Invalidate request for missing key='%s'\", key);\n\n    return removed;\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_flush_all:\n *   Invalidates ALL entries in the cache (use sparingly).\n */\nvoid\nmm_cache_flush_all(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return;\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    for (size_t i = 0; i < BUCKET_COUNT; ++i)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *cur = cache->buckets[i];\n        while (cur)\n        {\n            cache_entry_t *nx = cur->hnext;\n            free(cur->key);\n            free(cur->blob);\n            free(cur);\n            cur = nx;\n        }\n        cache->buckets[i] = NULL;\n    }\n    cache->lru_head = cache->lru_tail = NULL;\n    cache->size     = 0;\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"Cache flushed\");\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_prometheus_export:\n *   Exports cache metrics as a newline-delimited Prometheus text\n *   exposition format block.  The caller must free() the returned\n *   string when done.\n *\n *   Example output:\n *     # TYPE mm_cache_hits_total counter\n *     mm_cache_hits_total 1024\n *     ...\n */\nchar *\nmm_cache_prometheus_export(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return NULL;\n\n    /* We know exactly how many lines we have \u2014 pre-size buffer. */\n    const char *tpl =\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_hits_total Total number of cache hits\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_hits_total counter\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_hits_total %lu\\n\"\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_misses_total Total number of cache misses\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_misses_total counter\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_misses_total %lu\\n\"\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_evictions_total Total number of evictions/expirations\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_evictions_total counter\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_evictions_total %lu\\n\"\n        \"# HELP mm_cache_entries Gauge of current cache entries\\n\"\n        \"# TYPE mm_cache_entries gauge\\n\"\n        \"mm_cache_entries %zu\\n\";\n\n    size_t sz = snprintf(NULL, 0, tpl,\n                         (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->hits),\n                         (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->misses),\n                         (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->evictions),\n                         cache->size);\n\n    char *buf = malloc(sz + 1);\n    if (!buf) return NULL;\n\n    snprintf(buf, sz + 1, tpl,\n             (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->hits),\n             (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->misses),\n             (unsigned long)atomic_load(&cache->evictions),\n             cache->size);\n\n    return buf;\n}\n\n/* =========================  Periodic Maintenance  ========================= */\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_purge_expired:\n *   Scans and removes expired entries (O(N) worst-case).  Intended to be\n *   triggered by a housekeeping thread every few seconds.\n */\nsize_t\nmm_cache_purge_expired(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return 0;\n\n    size_t purged = 0;\n    time_t now    = time(NULL);\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    cache_entry_t *cur = cache->lru_tail; /* Start from cold tail */\n    while (cur)\n    {\n        cache_entry_t *prev = cur->prev;\n\n        if (cur->expiry < now)\n        {\n            /* Detach from LRU */\n            if (cur->prev) cur->prev->next = cur->next;\n            if (cur->next) cur->next->prev = cur->prev;\n            if (cache->lru_head == cur) cache->lru_head = cur->next;\n            if (cache->lru_tail == cur) cache->lru_tail = cur->prev;\n\n            /* Hash remove */\n            hash_remove(cache, cur);\n\n            free(cur->key);\n            free(cur->blob);\n            free(cur);\n\n            cache->size--;\n            purged++;\n            atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n        }\n        cur = prev;\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    if (purged)\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"Purged %zu expired entries\", purged);\n\n    return purged;\n}\n```",

61. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/project/src/module_69.txt",
  "limit": 20,
  "offset": 390
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    if (removed)\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"INFO\", \"Invalidated key='%s'\", key);\n    else\n        MM_CACHE_LOG(\"DEBUG\", \"Invalidate request for missing key='%s'\", key);\n\n    return removed;\n}\n\n/*\n * mm_cache_flush_all:\n *   Invalidates ALL entries in the cache (use sparingly).\n */\nvoid\nmm_cache_flush_all(mm_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return;",
