  "newString": "#define _POSIX_C_SOURCE 200809L    /* For clock_gettime / nanosleep */\n#include <errno.h>\n#include <inttypes.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n#include <stddef.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include \"uthash.h\"                /* Single-header hash table: https://troydhanson.github.io/uthash/ */\n\n#include \"logging.h\"\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Project-local lightweight shims  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\n/* Map legacy log levels and MMCH_LOG macro to centralized logging */\nenum { LOG_TRACE_LEGACY = 0, LOG_DEBUG_LEGACY, LOG_INFO_LEGACY, LOG_WARN_LEGACY, LOG_ERROR_LEGACY, LOG_FATAL_LEGACY };\n#define MMCH_LOG(level, fmt, ...)                                                        \\\n    do {                                                                                 \\\n        if ((level) == LOG_ERROR_LEGACY || (level) == LOG_FATAL_LEGACY)                  \\\n            LOG_ERROR(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                               \\\n        else if ((level) == LOG_WARN_LEGACY)                                             \\\n            LOG_WARN(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                                \\\n        else if ((level) == LOG_INFO_LEGACY)                                             \\\n            LOG_INFO(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                                \\\n        else                                                                             \\\n            LOG_DEBUG(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                               \\\n    } while (0)",
  "oldString": "#define _POSIX_C_SOURCE 200809L    /* For clock_gettime / nanosleep */\n#include <errno.h>\n#include <inttypes.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n#include <stddef.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include \"uthash.h\"                /* Single-header hash table: https://troydhanson.github.io/uthash/ */\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Project-local lightweight shims  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\n#ifndef MMCH_LOG_H\n#define MMCH_LOG_H\nenum { LOG_TRACE = 0, LOG_DEBUG, LOG_INFO, LOG_WARN, LOG_ERROR, LOG_FATAL };\nstatic const char *LOG_LEVEL_STR[] = { \"TRACE\", \"DEBUG\", \"INFO\", \"WARN\", \"ERROR\", \"FATAL\" };\n#define MMCH_LOG(level, fmt, ...)                                                        \\\n    do {                                                                                 \\\n        if ((level) >= LOG_INFO)                                                         \\\n            fprintf(stderr, \"[%s] (%s:%d) \" fmt \"\\n\", LOG_LEVEL_STR[level],              \\\n                    __FILE__, __LINE__, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                  \\\n    } while (0)\n#endif /* MMCH_LOG_H */",
  "originalFile": "```c\n/****************************************************************************************\n * MercuryMonolith Commerce Hub\n * Module 23  \u2013 Response Cache (in-memory, TTL aware, LRU, thread-safe)\n *\n * File Path : src/module_23.txt           (compiled as response_cache.c)\n * Language   : C99\n *\n * This module provides a small, fully in-memory HTTP/GraphQL response cache that is:\n *   \u2022 Thread-safe (read-mostly workloads optimized with RW-locks)\n *   \u2022 LRU-evicting, TTL-aware (seconds granularity)\n *   \u2022 Introspectable via Prometheus-style counters\n *   \u2022 Pluggable into Gateway / Service-Layer middleware chains\n *\n * NOTE: Only a minimal subset of the surrounding project\u2019s infrastructure (logging,\n *       metrics, event-bus) is mocked here so that this file remains self-contained.\n ****************************************************************************************/\n\n#define _POSIX_C_SOURCE 200809L    /* For clock_gettime / nanosleep */\n#include <errno.h>\n#include <inttypes.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n#include <stddef.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include \"uthash.h\"                /* Single-header hash table: https://troydhanson.github.io/uthash/ */\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Project-local lightweight shims  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\n#ifndef MMCH_LOG_H\n#define MMCH_LOG_H\nenum { LOG_TRACE = 0, LOG_DEBUG, LOG_INFO, LOG_WARN, LOG_ERROR, LOG_FATAL };\nstatic const char *LOG_LEVEL_STR[] = { \"TRACE\", \"DEBUG\", \"INFO\", \"WARN\", \"ERROR\", \"FATAL\" };\n#define MMCH_LOG(level, fmt, ...)                                                        \\\n    do {                                                                                 \\\n        if ((level) >= LOG_INFO)                                                         \\\n            fprintf(stderr, \"[%s] (%s:%d) \" fmt \"\\n\", LOG_LEVEL_STR[level],              \\\n                    __FILE__, __LINE__, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                  \\\n    } while (0)\n#endif /* MMCH_LOG_H */\n\n#ifndef MMCH_METRICS_H\n#define MMCH_METRICS_H\ntypedef struct {\n    uint64_t hits;\n    uint64_t misses;\n    uint64_t evictions;\n    uint64_t expirations;\n} mmch_cache_metrics_t;\n#endif /* MMCH_METRICS_H */\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Public API types / constants \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\ntypedef struct mmch_cache_entry_s {\n    char               *key;          /* Hash key (URI + query string) */\n    void               *blob;         /* Opaque response payload        */\n    size_t              blob_len;     /* Bytes                          */\n    time_t              expires_at;   /* Wall clock seconds             */\n\n    /* Doubly-linked LRU list */\n    struct mmch_cache_entry_s *prev;\n    struct mmch_cache_entry_s *next;\n\n    UT_hash_handle hh;                /* uthash handle (key)            */\n} mmch_cache_entry_t;\n\n/* Forward so that internals can reference */\ntypedef struct mmch_cache_s mmch_cache_t;\n\n/* Result codes  */\ntypedef enum {\n    MMCH_CACHE_OK = 0,\n    MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND,\n    MMCH_CACHE_ERR,\n    MMCH_CACHE_DISABLED\n} mmch_cache_rc;\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\nstruct mmch_cache_s {\n    size_t                  max_entries;\n    time_t                  default_ttl;\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t     *table;        /* uthash hash table (key \u2192 entry) */\n    mmch_cache_entry_t     *lru_head;     /* Most recently used              */\n    mmch_cache_entry_t     *lru_tail;     /* Least recently used             */\n\n    pthread_rwlock_t        lock;         /* Readers / writer guard          */\n    pthread_t               janitor_tid;  /* Periodic expiry thread          */\n    int                     stop_janitor; /* Cooperative cancel flag         */\n\n    mmch_cache_metrics_t    metrics;\n};\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Internal helper prototypes  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\nstatic void  _move_to_front(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e);\nstatic void  _unlink_from_lru(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e);\nstatic void  _prune_if_needed(mmch_cache_t *c);\nstatic void *_janitor_thread(void *arg);\n\n/*\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n *  Public API\n *\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550*/\n\n/* Create a new cache handle. Returns NULL on allocation failure. */\nmmch_cache_t *mmch_cache_create(size_t max_entries, time_t default_ttl_sec)\n{\n    mmch_cache_t *c = calloc(1, sizeof(*c));\n    if (!c) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR, \"calloc failed while creating cache\");\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    c->max_entries  = max_entries ? max_entries : 4096;        /* sensible default */\n    c->default_ttl  = default_ttl_sec ? default_ttl_sec : 300; /* 5 minutes        */\n\n    if (pthread_rwlock_init(&c->lock, NULL) != 0) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR, \"pthread_rwlock_init failed: %s\", strerror(errno));\n        free(c);\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    /* Launch background janitor that purges expired entries */\n    if (pthread_create(&c->janitor_tid, NULL, _janitor_thread, c) != 0) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR, \"Failed to start janitor thread\");\n        pthread_rwlock_destroy(&c->lock);\n        free(c);\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    MMCH_LOG(LOG_INFO, \"MMCH response cache created (capacity=%zu, default_ttl=%lds)\",\n             c->max_entries, c->default_ttl);\n    return c;\n}\n\n/* Destroy cache and release all memory. */\nvoid mmch_cache_destroy(mmch_cache_t *c)\n{\n    if (!c) return;\n\n    /* Stop janitor thread */\n    c->stop_janitor = 1;\n    pthread_join(c->janitor_tid, NULL);\n\n    /* Acquire exclusive to safely walk / free */\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *curr, *tmp;\n    HASH_ITER(hh, c->table, curr, tmp) {\n        HASH_DEL(c->table, curr);\n        free(curr->key);\n        free(curr->blob);\n        free(curr);\n    }\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    pthread_rwlock_destroy(&c->lock);\n    free(c);\n\n    MMCH_LOG(LOG_INFO, \"MMCH response cache destroyed\");\n}\n\n/*\n * Get cached response by key.\n *   \u2022 On success returns MMCH_CACHE_OK and sets *out_blob + *out_len.\n *   \u2022 The caller owns a duplicate buffer (malloc-ed) and must free().\n */\nmmch_cache_rc mmch_cache_get(mmch_cache_t *c,\n                             const char  *key,\n                             void       **out_blob,\n                             size_t      *out_len)\n{\n    if (!c || !key) return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_rdlock(&c->lock);\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *e;\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n    if (!e) {\n        c->metrics.misses++;\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        return MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND;\n    }\n\n    /* Check expiration */\n    time_t now = time(NULL);\n    if (e->expires_at < now) {\n        /* Need to promote to writer to safely delete */\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n        /* Re-validate in write lock */\n        HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n        if (e && e->expires_at < time(NULL)) {\n            _unlink_from_lru(c, e);\n            HASH_DEL(c->table, e);\n            free(e->key); free(e->blob); free(e);\n            c->metrics.expirations++;\n        }\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        return MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND;\n    }\n\n    /* Hit */\n    c->metrics.hits++;\n\n    /* Move to LRU front (need writer) */\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e); /* fetch again just in case */\n    if (e) _move_to_front(c, e);\n\n    /* Deep copy so caller owns memory */\n    *out_blob = malloc(e->blob_len);\n    if (!*out_blob) {\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n    }\n    memcpy(*out_blob, e->blob, e->blob_len);\n    *out_len = e->blob_len;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    return MMCH_CACHE_OK;\n}\n\n/*\n * Put/Update cache entry.\n * ttl_sec = 0 uses default TTL.\n */\nmmch_cache_rc mmch_cache_put(mmch_cache_t *c,\n                             const char  *key,\n                             const void  *blob,\n                             size_t       blob_len,\n                             time_t       ttl_sec)\n{\n    if (!c || !key || !blob || blob_len == 0) return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *e;\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n    if (e) {\n        /* Update existing */\n        void *new_blob = realloc(e->blob, blob_len);\n        if (!new_blob) {\n            pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n            return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n        }\n        memcpy(new_blob, blob, blob_len);\n        e->blob       = new_blob;\n        e->blob_len   = blob_len;\n        e->expires_at = time(NULL) + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : c->default_ttl);\n        _move_to_front(c, e);\n    } else {\n        /* New entry */\n        e = calloc(1, sizeof(*e));\n        if (!e) {\n            pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n            return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n        }\n\n        e->key = strdup(key);\n        if (!e->key) { free(e); pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock); return MMCH_CACHE_ERR; }\n\n        e->blob = malloc(blob_len);\n        if (!e->blob) { free(e->key); free(e); pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock); return MMCH_CACHE_ERR; }\n\n        memcpy(e->blob, blob, blob_len);\n        e->blob_len   = blob_len;\n        e->expires_at = time(NULL) + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : c->default_ttl);\n\n        /* Insert at front */\n        e->prev = NULL;\n        e->next = c->lru_head;\n        if (c->lru_head) c->lru_head->prev = e;\n        c->lru_head = e;\n        if (!c->lru_tail) c->lru_tail = e;\n\n        HASH_ADD_KEYPTR(hh, c->table, e->key, strlen(e->key), e);\n        _prune_if_needed(c);\n    }\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    return MMCH_CACHE_OK;\n}\n\n/* Invalidate (remove) a single key */\nvoid mmch_cache_invalidate(mmch_cache_t *c, const char *key)\n{\n    if (!c || !key) return;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *e;\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n    if (e) {\n        _unlink_from_lru(c, e);\n        HASH_DEL(c->table, e);\n        free(e->key); free(e->blob); free(e);\n        c->metrics.evictions++;\n    }\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n}\n\n/* Expose metrics snapshot (caller copies) */\nvoid mmch_cache_snapshot_metrics(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_metrics_t *out)\n{\n    if (!c || !out) return;\n    pthread_rwlock_rdlock(&c->lock);\n    *out = c->metrics;\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n}\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Internal helpers  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\n\nstatic void _move_to_front(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e)\n{\n    if (c->lru_head == e) return; /* already front */\n\n    _unlink_from_lru(c, e);\n\n    e->prev = NULL;\n    e->next = c->lru_head;\n    if (c->lru_head) c->lru_head->prev = e;\n    c->lru_head = e;\n    if (!c->lru_tail) c->lru_tail = e;\n}\n\nstatic void _unlink_from_lru(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e)\n{\n    if (e->prev) e->prev->next = e->next;\n    if (e->next) e->next->prev = e->prev;\n    if (c->lru_head == e) c->lru_head = e->next;\n    if (c->lru_tail == e) c->lru_tail = e->prev;\n    e->prev = e->next = NULL;\n}\n\n/* Evict LRU until size \u2264 max_entries */\nstatic void _prune_if_needed(mmch_cache_t *c)\n{\n    while (HASH_COUNT(c->table) > c->max_entries && c->lru_tail) {\n        mmch_cache_entry_t *victim = c->lru_tail;\n        _unlink_from_lru(c, victim);\n        HASH_DEL(c->table, victim);\n        free(victim->key); free(victim->blob); free(victim);\n        c->metrics.evictions++;\n    }\n}\n\n/* Background thread: periodically purge expired items                  */\nstatic void *_janitor_thread(void *arg)\n{\n    mmch_cache_t *c = arg;\n    const struct timespec nap = { .tv_sec = 1, .tv_nsec = 0 }; /* 1s */\n\n    while (!c->stop_janitor) {\n        nanosleep(&nap, NULL);\n\n        time_t now = time(NULL);\n        pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n        mmch_cache_entry_t *curr, *tmp;\n        HASH_ITER(hh, c->table, curr, tmp) {\n            if (curr->expires_at < now) {\n                _unlink_from_lru(c, curr);\n                HASH_DEL(c->table, curr);\n                free(curr->key); free(curr->blob); free(curr);\n                c->metrics.expirations++;\n            }\n        }\n\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    }\n    return NULL;\n}\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Example (unit test)  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\n#ifdef MMCH_CACHE_TEST\n\n#include <assert.h>\n\nint main(void)\n{\n    mmch_cache_t *c = mmch_cache_create(2, 2); /* small, 2-entry cache, short TTL */\n\n    const char *k1 = \"/foo\";\n    const char *v1 = \"hello\";\n    mmch_cache_put(c, k1, v1, strlen(v1) + 1, 0);\n\n    void *out; size_t len;\n    assert(mmch_cache_get(c, k1, &out, &len) == MMCH_CACHE_OK);\n    assert(len == strlen(v1) + 1 && strcmp(out, v1) == 0);\n    free(out);\n\n    /* Force eviction */\n    mmch_cache_put(c, \"/bar\", \"B\", 2, 0);\n    mmch_cache_put(c, \"/baz\", \"C\", 2, 0);\n    assert(mmch_cache_get(c, k1, &out, &len) == MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND);\n\n    mmch_cache_destroy(c);\n    MMCH_LOG(LOG_INFO, \"All tests passed\");\n    return 0;\n}\n\n#endif /* MMCH_CACHE_TEST */\n```",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " #include <time.h>",
        " #include \"uthash.h\"                /* Single-header hash table: https://troydhanson.github.io/uthash/ */",
        " ",
        "+#include \"logging.h\"",
        "+",
        " /*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Project-local lightweight shims  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/",
        "-#ifndef MMCH_LOG_H",
        "-#define MMCH_LOG_H",
        "-enum { LOG_TRACE = 0, LOG_DEBUG, LOG_INFO, LOG_WARN, LOG_ERROR, LOG_FATAL };",
        "-static const char *LOG_LEVEL_STR[] = { \"TRACE\", \"DEBUG\", \"INFO\", \"WARN\", \"ERROR\", \"FATAL\" };",
        "+/* Map legacy log levels and MMCH_LOG macro to centralized logging */",
        "+enum { LOG_TRACE_LEGACY = 0, LOG_DEBUG_LEGACY, LOG_INFO_LEGACY, LOG_WARN_LEGACY, LOG_ERROR_LEGACY, LOG_FATAL_LEGACY };",
        " #define MMCH_LOG(level, fmt, ...)                                                        \\",
        "     do {                                                                                 \\",
        "-        if ((level) >= LOG_INFO)                                                         \\",
        "-            fprintf(stderr, \"[%s] (%s:%d) \" fmt \"\\n\", LOG_LEVEL_STR[level],              \\",
        "-                    __FILE__, __LINE__, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                  \\",
        "+        if ((level) == LOG_ERROR_LEGACY || (level) == LOG_FATAL_LEGACY)                  \\",
        "+            LOG_ERROR(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                               \\",
        "+        else if ((level) == LOG_WARN_LEGACY)                                             \\",
        "+            LOG_WARN(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                                \\",
        "+        else if ((level) == LOG_INFO_LEGACY)                                             \\",
        "+            LOG_INFO(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                                \\",
        "+        else                                                                             \\",
        "+            LOG_DEBUG(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                               \\",
        "     } while (0)",
        "-#endif /* MMCH_LOG_H */",
        " ",
        " #ifndef MMCH_METRICS_H",
        " #define MMCH_METRICS_H"
      ],
      "newLines": 22,
      "newStart": 28,
      "oldLines": 18,
      "oldStart": 28
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

    "content": "/*\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n *  Public API\n *\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550*/\n\n/* Create a new cache handle. Returns NULL on allocation failure. */\nmmch_cache_t *mmch_cache_create(size_t max_entries, time_t default_ttl_sec)\n{\n    mmch_cache_t *c = calloc(1, sizeof(*c));\n    if (!c) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR, \"calloc failed while creating cache\");\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    c->max_entries  = max_entries ? max_entries : 4096;        /* sensible default */\n    c->default_ttl  = default_ttl_sec ? default_ttl_sec : 300; /* 5 minutes        */\n\n    if (pthread_rwlock_init(&c->lock, NULL) != 0) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR, \"pthread_rwlock_init failed: %s\", strerror(errno));\n        free(c);\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    /* Launch background janitor that purges expired entries */\n    if (pthread_create(&c->janitor_tid, NULL, _janitor_thread, c) != 0) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR, \"Failed to start janitor thread\");\n        pthread_rwlock_destroy(&c->lock);\n        free(c);\n        return NULL;\n    }\n",

  "originalFile": "```c\n/****************************************************************************************\n * MercuryMonolith Commerce Hub\n * Module 23  \u2013 Response Cache (in-memory, TTL aware, LRU, thread-safe)\n *\n * File Path : src/module_23.txt           (compiled as response_cache.c)\n * Language   : C99\n *\n * This module provides a small, fully in-memory HTTP/GraphQL response cache that is:\n *   \u2022 Thread-safe (read-mostly workloads optimized with RW-locks)\n *   \u2022 LRU-evicting, TTL-aware (seconds granularity)\n *   \u2022 Introspectable via Prometheus-style counters\n *   \u2022 Pluggable into Gateway / Service-Layer middleware chains\n *\n * NOTE: Only a minimal subset of the surrounding project\u2019s infrastructure (logging,\n *       metrics, event-bus) is mocked here so that this file remains self-contained.\n ****************************************************************************************/\n\n#define _POSIX_C_SOURCE 200809L    /* For clock_gettime / nanosleep */\n#include <errno.h>\n#include <inttypes.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n#include <stddef.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include \"uthash.h\"                /* Single-header hash table: https://troydhanson.github.io/uthash/ */\n\n#include \"logging.h\"\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Project-local lightweight shims  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\n/* Map legacy log levels and MMCH_LOG macro to centralized logging */\nenum { LOG_TRACE_LEGACY = 0, LOG_DEBUG_LEGACY, LOG_INFO_LEGACY, LOG_WARN_LEGACY, LOG_ERROR_LEGACY, LOG_FATAL_LEGACY };\n#define MMCH_LOG(level, fmt, ...)                                                        \\\n    do {                                                                                 \\\n        if ((level) == LOG_ERROR_LEGACY || (level) == LOG_FATAL_LEGACY)                  \\\n            LOG_ERROR(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                               \\\n        else if ((level) == LOG_WARN_LEGACY)                                             \\\n            LOG_WARN(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                                \\\n        else if ((level) == LOG_INFO_LEGACY)                                             \\\n            LOG_INFO(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                                \\\n        else                                                                             \\\n            LOG_DEBUG(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                               \\\n    } while (0)\n\n#ifndef MMCH_METRICS_H\n#define MMCH_METRICS_H\ntypedef struct {\n    uint64_t hits;\n    uint64_t misses;\n    uint64_t evictions;\n    uint64_t expirations;\n} mmch_cache_metrics_t;\n#endif /* MMCH_METRICS_H */\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Public API types / constants \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\ntypedef struct mmch_cache_entry_s {\n    char               *key;          /* Hash key (URI + query string) */\n    void               *blob;         /* Opaque response payload        */\n    size_t              blob_len;     /* Bytes                          */\n    time_t              expires_at;   /* Wall clock seconds             */\n\n    /* Doubly-linked LRU list */\n    struct mmch_cache_entry_s *prev;\n    struct mmch_cache_entry_s *next;\n\n    UT_hash_handle hh;                /* uthash handle (key)            */\n} mmch_cache_entry_t;\n\n/* Forward so that internals can reference */\ntypedef struct mmch_cache_s mmch_cache_t;\n\n/* Result codes  */\ntypedef enum {\n    MMCH_CACHE_OK = 0,\n    MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND,\n    MMCH_CACHE_ERR,\n    MMCH_CACHE_DISABLED\n} mmch_cache_rc;\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\nstruct mmch_cache_s {\n    size_t                  max_entries;\n    time_t                  default_ttl;\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t     *table;        /* uthash hash table (key \u2192 entry) */\n    mmch_cache_entry_t     *lru_head;     /* Most recently used              */\n    mmch_cache_entry_t     *lru_tail;     /* Least recently used             */\n\n    pthread_rwlock_t        lock;         /* Readers / writer guard          */\n    pthread_t               janitor_tid;  /* Periodic expiry thread          */\n    int                     stop_janitor; /* Cooperative cancel flag         */\n\n    mmch_cache_metrics_t    metrics;\n};\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Internal helper prototypes  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\nstatic void  _move_to_front(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e);\nstatic void  _unlink_from_lru(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e);\nstatic void  _prune_if_needed(mmch_cache_t *c);\nstatic void *_janitor_thread(void *arg);\n\n/*\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n *  Public API\n *\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550*/\n\n/* Create a new cache handle. Returns NULL on allocation failure. */\nmmch_cache_t *mmch_cache_create(size_t max_entries, time_t default_ttl_sec)\n{\n    mmch_cache_t *c = calloc(1, sizeof(*c));\n    if (!c) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR, \"calloc failed while creating cache\");\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    c->max_entries  = max_entries ? max_entries : 4096;        /* sensible default */\n    c->default_ttl  = default_ttl_sec ? default_ttl_sec : 300; /* 5 minutes        */\n\n    if (pthread_rwlock_init(&c->lock, NULL) != 0) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR, \"pthread_rwlock_init failed: %s\", strerror(errno));\n        free(c);\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    /* Launch background janitor that purges expired entries */\n    if (pthread_create(&c->janitor_tid, NULL, _janitor_thread, c) != 0) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR, \"Failed to start janitor thread\");\n        pthread_rwlock_destroy(&c->lock);\n        free(c);\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    MMCH_LOG(LOG_INFO, \"MMCH response cache created (capacity=%zu, default_ttl=%lds)\",\n             c->max_entries, c->default_ttl);\n    return c;\n}\n\n/* Destroy cache and release all memory. */\nvoid mmch_cache_destroy(mmch_cache_t *c)\n{\n    if (!c) return;\n\n    /* Stop janitor thread */\n    c->stop_janitor = 1;\n    pthread_join(c->janitor_tid, NULL);\n\n    /* Acquire exclusive to safely walk / free */\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *curr, *tmp;\n    HASH_ITER(hh, c->table, curr, tmp) {\n        HASH_DEL(c->table, curr);\n        free(curr->key);\n        free(curr->blob);\n        free(curr);\n    }\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    pthread_rwlock_destroy(&c->lock);\n    free(c);\n\n    MMCH_LOG(LOG_INFO, \"MMCH response cache destroyed\");\n}\n\n/*\n * Get cached response by key.\n *   \u2022 On success returns MMCH_CACHE_OK and sets *out_blob + *out_len.\n *   \u2022 The caller owns a duplicate buffer (malloc-ed) and must free().\n */\nmmch_cache_rc mmch_cache_get(mmch_cache_t *c,\n                             const char  *key,\n                             void       **out_blob,\n                             size_t      *out_len)\n{\n    if (!c || !key) return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_rdlock(&c->lock);\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *e;\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n    if (!e) {\n        c->metrics.misses++;\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        return MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND;\n    }\n\n    /* Check expiration */\n    time_t now = time(NULL);\n    if (e->expires_at < now) {\n        /* Need to promote to writer to safely delete */\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n        /* Re-validate in write lock */\n        HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n        if (e && e->expires_at < time(NULL)) {\n            _unlink_from_lru(c, e);\n            HASH_DEL(c->table, e);\n            free(e->key); free(e->blob); free(e);\n            c->metrics.expirations++;\n        }\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        return MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND;\n    }\n\n    /* Hit */\n    c->metrics.hits++;\n\n    /* Move to LRU front (need writer) */\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e); /* fetch again just in case */\n    if (e) _move_to_front(c, e);\n\n    /* Deep copy so caller owns memory */\n    *out_blob = malloc(e->blob_len);\n    if (!*out_blob) {\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n    }\n    memcpy(*out_blob, e->blob, e->blob_len);\n    *out_len = e->blob_len;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    return MMCH_CACHE_OK;\n}\n\n/*\n * Put/Update cache entry.\n * ttl_sec = 0 uses default TTL.\n */\nmmch_cache_rc mmch_cache_put(mmch_cache_t *c,\n                             const char  *key,\n                             const void  *blob,\n                             size_t       blob_len,\n                             time_t       ttl_sec)\n{\n    if (!c || !key || !blob || blob_len == 0) return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *e;\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n    if (e) {\n        /* Update existing */\n        void *new_blob = realloc(e->blob, blob_len);\n        if (!new_blob) {\n            pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n            return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n        }\n        memcpy(new_blob, blob, blob_len);\n        e->blob       = new_blob;\n        e->blob_len   = blob_len;\n        e->expires_at = time(NULL) + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : c->default_ttl);\n        _move_to_front(c, e);\n    } else {\n        /* New entry */\n        e = calloc(1, sizeof(*e));\n        if (!e) {\n            pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n            return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n        }\n\n        e->key = strdup(key);\n        if (!e->key) { free(e); pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock); return MMCH_CACHE_ERR; }\n\n        e->blob = malloc(blob_len);\n        if (!e->blob) { free(e->key); free(e); pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock); return MMCH_CACHE_ERR; }\n\n        memcpy(e->blob, blob, blob_len);\n        e->blob_len   = blob_len;\n        e->expires_at = time(NULL) + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : c->default_ttl);\n\n        /* Insert at front */\n        e->prev = NULL;\n        e->next = c->lru_head;\n        if (c->lru_head) c->lru_head->prev = e;\n        c->lru_head = e;\n        if (!c->lru_tail) c->lru_tail = e;\n\n        HASH_ADD_KEYPTR(hh, c->table, e->key, strlen(e->key), e);\n        _prune_if_needed(c);\n    }\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    return MMCH_CACHE_OK;\n}\n\n/* Invalidate (remove) a single key */\nvoid mmch_cache_invalidate(mmch_cache_t *c, const char *key)\n{\n    if (!c || !key) return;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *e;\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n    if (e) {\n        _unlink_from_lru(c, e);\n        HASH_DEL(c->table, e);\n        free(e->key); free(e->blob); free(e);\n        c->metrics.evictions++;\n    }\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n}\n\n/* Expose metrics snapshot (caller copies) */\nvoid mmch_cache_snapshot_metrics(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_metrics_t *out)\n{\n    if (!c || !out) return;\n    pthread_rwlock_rdlock(&c->lock);\n    *out = c->metrics;\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n}\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Internal helpers  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\n\nstatic void _move_to_front(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e)\n{\n    if (c->lru_head == e) return; /* already front */\n\n    _unlink_from_lru(c, e);\n\n    e->prev = NULL;\n    e->next = c->lru_head;\n    if (c->lru_head) c->lru_head->prev = e;\n    c->lru_head = e;\n    if (!c->lru_tail) c->lru_tail = e;\n}\n\nstatic void _unlink_from_lru(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e)\n{\n    if (e->prev) e->prev->next = e->next;\n    if (e->next) e->next->prev = e->prev;\n    if (c->lru_head == e) c->lru_head = e->next;\n    if (c->lru_tail == e) c->lru_tail = e->prev;\n    e->prev = e->next = NULL;\n}\n\n/* Evict LRU until size \u2264 max_entries */\nstatic void _prune_if_needed(mmch_cache_t *c)\n{\n    while (HASH_COUNT(c->table) > c->max_entries && c->lru_tail) {\n        mmch_cache_entry_t *victim = c->lru_tail;\n        _unlink_from_lru(c, victim);\n        HASH_DEL(c->table, victim);\n        free(victim->key); free(victim->blob); free(victim);\n        c->metrics.evictions++;\n    }\n}\n\n/* Background thread: periodically purge expired items                  */\nstatic void *_janitor_thread(void *arg)\n{\n    mmch_cache_t *c = arg;\n    const struct timespec nap = { .tv_sec = 1, .tv_nsec = 0 }; /* 1s */\n\n    while (!c->stop_janitor) {\n        nanosleep(&nap, NULL);\n\n        time_t now = time(NULL);\n        pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n        mmch_cache_entry_t *curr, *tmp;\n        HASH_ITER(hh, c->table, curr, tmp) {\n            if (curr->expires_at < now) {\n                _unlink_from_lru(c, curr);\n                HASH_DEL(c->table, curr);\n                free(curr->key); free(curr->blob); free(curr);\n                c->metrics.expirations++;\n            }\n        }\n\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    }\n    return NULL;\n}\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Example (unit test)  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\n#ifdef MMCH_CACHE_TEST\n\n#include <assert.h>\n\nint main(void)\n{\n    mmch_cache_t *c = mmch_cache_create(2, 2); /* small, 2-entry cache, short TTL */\n\n    const char *k1 = \"/foo\";\n    const char *v1 = \"hello\";\n    mmch_cache_put(c, k1, v1, strlen(v1) + 1, 0);\n\n    void *out; size_t len;\n    assert(mmch_cache_get(c, k1, &out, &len) == MMCH_CACHE_OK);\n    assert(len == strlen(v1) + 1 && strcmp(out, v1) == 0);\n    free(out);\n\n    /* Force eviction */\n    mmch_cache_put(c, \"/bar\", \"B\", 2, 0);\n    mmch_cache_put(c, \"/baz\", \"C\", 2, 0);\n    assert(mmch_cache_get(c, k1, &out, &len) == MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND);\n\n    mmch_cache_destroy(c);\n    MMCH_LOG(LOG_INFO, \"All tests passed\");\n    return 0;\n}\n\n#endif /* MMCH_CACHE_TEST */\n```",

  "originalFile": "```c\n/****************************************************************************************\n * MercuryMonolith Commerce Hub\n * Module 23  \u2013 Response Cache (in-memory, TTL aware, LRU, thread-safe)\n *\n * File Path : src/module_23.txt           (compiled as response_cache.c)\n * Language   : C99\n *\n * This module provides a small, fully in-memory HTTP/GraphQL response cache that is:\n *   \u2022 Thread-safe (read-mostly workloads optimized with RW-locks)\n *   \u2022 LRU-evicting, TTL-aware (seconds granularity)\n *   \u2022 Introspectable via Prometheus-style counters\n *   \u2022 Pluggable into Gateway / Service-Layer middleware chains\n *\n * NOTE: Only a minimal subset of the surrounding project\u2019s infrastructure (logging,\n *       metrics, event-bus) is mocked here so that this file remains self-contained.\n ****************************************************************************************/\n\n#define _POSIX_C_SOURCE 200809L    /* For clock_gettime / nanosleep */\n#include <errno.h>\n#include <inttypes.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n#include <stddef.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include \"uthash.h\"                /* Single-header hash table: https://troydhanson.github.io/uthash/ */\n\n#include \"logging.h\"\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Project-local lightweight shims  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\n/* Map legacy log levels and MMCH_LOG macro to centralized logging */\nenum { LOG_TRACE_LEGACY = 0, LOG_DEBUG_LEGACY, LOG_INFO_LEGACY, LOG_WARN_LEGACY, LOG_ERROR_LEGACY, LOG_FATAL_LEGACY };\n#define MMCH_LOG(level, fmt, ...)                                                        \\\n    do {                                                                                 \\\n        if ((level) == LOG_ERROR_LEGACY || (level) == LOG_FATAL_LEGACY)                  \\\n            LOG_ERROR(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                               \\\n        else if ((level) == LOG_WARN_LEGACY)                                             \\\n            LOG_WARN(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                                \\\n        else if ((level) == LOG_INFO_LEGACY)                                             \\\n            LOG_INFO(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                                \\\n        else                                                                             \\\n            LOG_DEBUG(fmt, ##__VA_ARGS__);                                               \\\n    } while (0)\n\n#ifndef MMCH_METRICS_H\n#define MMCH_METRICS_H\ntypedef struct {\n    uint64_t hits;\n    uint64_t misses;\n    uint64_t evictions;\n    uint64_t expirations;\n} mmch_cache_metrics_t;\n#endif /* MMCH_METRICS_H */\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Public API types / constants \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\ntypedef struct mmch_cache_entry_s {\n    char               *key;          /* Hash key (URI + query string) */\n    void               *blob;         /* Opaque response payload        */\n    size_t              blob_len;     /* Bytes                          */\n    time_t              expires_at;   /* Wall clock seconds             */\n\n    /* Doubly-linked LRU list */\n    struct mmch_cache_entry_s *prev;\n    struct mmch_cache_entry_s *next;\n\n    UT_hash_handle hh;                /* uthash handle (key)            */\n} mmch_cache_entry_t;\n\n/* Forward so that internals can reference */\ntypedef struct mmch_cache_s mmch_cache_t;\n\n/* Result codes  */\ntypedef enum {\n    MMCH_CACHE_OK = 0,\n    MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND,\n    MMCH_CACHE_ERR,\n    MMCH_CACHE_DISABLED\n} mmch_cache_rc;\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\nstruct mmch_cache_s {\n    size_t                  max_entries;\n    time_t                  default_ttl;\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t     *table;        /* uthash hash table (key \u2192 entry) */\n    mmch_cache_entry_t     *lru_head;     /* Most recently used              */\n    mmch_cache_entry_t     *lru_tail;     /* Least recently used             */\n\n    pthread_rwlock_t        lock;         /* Readers / writer guard          */\n    pthread_t               janitor_tid;  /* Periodic expiry thread          */\n    int                     stop_janitor; /* Cooperative cancel flag         */\n\n    mmch_cache_metrics_t    metrics;\n};\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Internal helper prototypes  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\nstatic void  _move_to_front(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e);\nstatic void  _unlink_from_lru(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e);\nstatic void  _prune_if_needed(mmch_cache_t *c);\nstatic void *_janitor_thread(void *arg);\n\n/*\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n *  Public API\n *\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550*/\n\n/* Create a new cache handle. Returns NULL on allocation failure. */\nmmch_cache_t *mmch_cache_create(size_t max_entries, time_t default_ttl_sec)\n{\n    mmch_cache_t *c = calloc(1, sizeof(*c));\n    if (!c) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR_LEGACY, \"calloc failed while creating cache\");\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    c->max_entries  = max_entries ? max_entries : 4096;        /* sensible default */\n    c->default_ttl  = default_ttl_sec ? default_ttl_sec : 300; /* 5 minutes        */\n\n    if (pthread_rwlock_init(&c->lock, NULL) != 0) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR_LEGACY, \"pthread_rwlock_init failed: %s\", strerror(errno));\n        free(c);\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    /* Launch background janitor that purges expired entries */\n    if (pthread_create(&c->janitor_tid, NULL, _janitor_thread, c) != 0) {\n        MMCH_LOG(LOG_ERROR_LEGACY, \"Failed to start janitor thread\");\n        pthread_rwlock_destroy(&c->lock);\n        free(c);\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    MMCH_LOG(LOG_INFO, \"MMCH response cache created (capacity=%zu, default_ttl=%lds)\",\n             c->max_entries, c->default_ttl);\n    return c;\n}\n\n/* Destroy cache and release all memory. */\nvoid mmch_cache_destroy(mmch_cache_t *c)\n{\n    if (!c) return;\n\n    /* Stop janitor thread */\n    c->stop_janitor = 1;\n    pthread_join(c->janitor_tid, NULL);\n\n    /* Acquire exclusive to safely walk / free */\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *curr, *tmp;\n    HASH_ITER(hh, c->table, curr, tmp) {\n        HASH_DEL(c->table, curr);\n        free(curr->key);\n        free(curr->blob);\n        free(curr);\n    }\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    pthread_rwlock_destroy(&c->lock);\n    free(c);\n\n    MMCH_LOG(LOG_INFO, \"MMCH response cache destroyed\");\n}\n\n/*\n * Get cached response by key.\n *   \u2022 On success returns MMCH_CACHE_OK and sets *out_blob + *out_len.\n *   \u2022 The caller owns a duplicate buffer (malloc-ed) and must free().\n */\nmmch_cache_rc mmch_cache_get(mmch_cache_t *c,\n                             const char  *key,\n                             void       **out_blob,\n                             size_t      *out_len)\n{\n    if (!c || !key) return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_rdlock(&c->lock);\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *e;\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n    if (!e) {\n        c->metrics.misses++;\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        return MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND;\n    }\n\n    /* Check expiration */\n    time_t now = time(NULL);\n    if (e->expires_at < now) {\n        /* Need to promote to writer to safely delete */\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n        /* Re-validate in write lock */\n        HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n        if (e && e->expires_at < time(NULL)) {\n            _unlink_from_lru(c, e);\n            HASH_DEL(c->table, e);\n            free(e->key); free(e->blob); free(e);\n            c->metrics.expirations++;\n        }\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        return MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND;\n    }\n\n    /* Hit */\n    c->metrics.hits++;\n\n    /* Move to LRU front (need writer) */\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e); /* fetch again just in case */\n    if (e) _move_to_front(c, e);\n\n    /* Deep copy so caller owns memory */\n    *out_blob = malloc(e->blob_len);\n    if (!*out_blob) {\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n        return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n    }\n    memcpy(*out_blob, e->blob, e->blob_len);\n    *out_len = e->blob_len;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    return MMCH_CACHE_OK;\n}\n\n/*\n * Put/Update cache entry.\n * ttl_sec = 0 uses default TTL.\n */\nmmch_cache_rc mmch_cache_put(mmch_cache_t *c,\n                             const char  *key,\n                             const void  *blob,\n                             size_t       blob_len,\n                             time_t       ttl_sec)\n{\n    if (!c || !key || !blob || blob_len == 0) return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *e;\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n    if (e) {\n        /* Update existing */\n        void *new_blob = realloc(e->blob, blob_len);\n        if (!new_blob) {\n            pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n            return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n        }\n        memcpy(new_blob, blob, blob_len);\n        e->blob       = new_blob;\n        e->blob_len   = blob_len;\n        e->expires_at = time(NULL) + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : c->default_ttl);\n        _move_to_front(c, e);\n    } else {\n        /* New entry */\n        e = calloc(1, sizeof(*e));\n        if (!e) {\n            pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n            return MMCH_CACHE_ERR;\n        }\n\n        e->key = strdup(key);\n        if (!e->key) { free(e); pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock); return MMCH_CACHE_ERR; }\n\n        e->blob = malloc(blob_len);\n        if (!e->blob) { free(e->key); free(e); pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock); return MMCH_CACHE_ERR; }\n\n        memcpy(e->blob, blob, blob_len);\n        e->blob_len   = blob_len;\n        e->expires_at = time(NULL) + (ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : c->default_ttl);\n\n        /* Insert at front */\n        e->prev = NULL;\n        e->next = c->lru_head;\n        if (c->lru_head) c->lru_head->prev = e;\n        c->lru_head = e;\n        if (!c->lru_tail) c->lru_tail = e;\n\n        HASH_ADD_KEYPTR(hh, c->table, e->key, strlen(e->key), e);\n        _prune_if_needed(c);\n    }\n\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    return MMCH_CACHE_OK;\n}\n\n/* Invalidate (remove) a single key */\nvoid mmch_cache_invalidate(mmch_cache_t *c, const char *key)\n{\n    if (!c || !key) return;\n\n    pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n    mmch_cache_entry_t *e;\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n    if (e) {\n        _unlink_from_lru(c, e);\n        HASH_DEL(c->table, e);\n        free(e->key); free(e->blob); free(e);\n        c->metrics.evictions++;\n    }\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n}\n\n/* Expose metrics snapshot (caller copies) */\nvoid mmch_cache_snapshot_metrics(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_metrics_t *out)\n{\n    if (!c || !out) return;\n    pthread_rwlock_rdlock(&c->lock);\n    *out = c->metrics;\n    pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n}\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Internal helpers  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\n\nstatic void _move_to_front(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e)\n{\n    if (c->lru_head == e) return; /* already front */\n\n    _unlink_from_lru(c, e);\n\n    e->prev = NULL;\n    e->next = c->lru_head;\n    if (c->lru_head) c->lru_head->prev = e;\n    c->lru_head = e;\n    if (!c->lru_tail) c->lru_tail = e;\n}\n\nstatic void _unlink_from_lru(mmch_cache_t *c, mmch_cache_entry_t *e)\n{\n    if (e->prev) e->prev->next = e->next;\n    if (e->next) e->next->prev = e->prev;\n    if (c->lru_head == e) c->lru_head = e->next;\n    if (c->lru_tail == e) c->lru_tail = e->prev;\n    e->prev = e->next = NULL;\n}\n\n/* Evict LRU until size \u2264 max_entries */\nstatic void _prune_if_needed(mmch_cache_t *c)\n{\n    while (HASH_COUNT(c->table) > c->max_entries && c->lru_tail) {\n        mmch_cache_entry_t *victim = c->lru_tail;\n        _unlink_from_lru(c, victim);\n        HASH_DEL(c->table, victim);\n        free(victim->key); free(victim->blob); free(victim);\n        c->metrics.evictions++;\n    }\n}\n\n/* Background thread: periodically purge expired items                  */\nstatic void *_janitor_thread(void *arg)\n{\n    mmch_cache_t *c = arg;\n    const struct timespec nap = { .tv_sec = 1, .tv_nsec = 0 }; /* 1s */\n\n    while (!c->stop_janitor) {\n        nanosleep(&nap, NULL);\n\n        time_t now = time(NULL);\n        pthread_rwlock_wrlock(&c->lock);\n\n        mmch_cache_entry_t *curr, *tmp;\n        HASH_ITER(hh, c->table, curr, tmp) {\n            if (curr->expires_at < now) {\n                _unlink_from_lru(c, curr);\n                HASH_DEL(c->table, curr);\n                free(curr->key); free(curr->blob); free(curr);\n                c->metrics.expirations++;\n            }\n        }\n\n        pthread_rwlock_unlock(&c->lock);\n    }\n    return NULL;\n}\n\n/*\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  Example (unit test)  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500*/\n#ifdef MMCH_CACHE_TEST\n\n#include <assert.h>\n\nint main(void)\n{\n    mmch_cache_t *c = mmch_cache_create(2, 2); /* small, 2-entry cache, short TTL */\n\n    const char *k1 = \"/foo\";\n    const char *v1 = \"hello\";\n    mmch_cache_put(c, k1, v1, strlen(v1) + 1, 0);\n\n    void *out; size_t len;\n    assert(mmch_cache_get(c, k1, &out, &len) == MMCH_CACHE_OK);\n    assert(len == strlen(v1) + 1 && strcmp(out, v1) == 0);\n    free(out);\n\n    /* Force eviction */\n    mmch_cache_put(c, \"/bar\", \"B\", 2, 0);\n    mmch_cache_put(c, \"/baz\", \"C\", 2, 0);\n    assert(mmch_cache_get(c, k1, &out, &len) == MMCH_CACHE_NOTFOUND);\n\n    mmch_cache_destroy(c);\n    MMCH_LOG(LOG_INFO, \"All tests passed\");\n    return 0;\n}\n\n#endif /* MMCH_CACHE_TEST */\n```",

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "/*\n * MercuryMonolith Commerce Hub\n * --------------------------------------\n * Module 52  : response_cache\n * File       : src/module_52.txt   (compiled as C source)\n *\n * High-performance in-memory HTTP response cache with LRU eviction, TTL support,\n * structured logging, and Prometheus-compatible metrics export.\n *\n * The cache is designed to be shared across REST / GraphQL endpoints inside the\n * monolith and is 100 % thread-safe (single global mutex for simplicity; can be\n * replaced with sharding or read-write locks if contention becomes measurable).\n *\n * SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\n */\n\n#define _GNU_SOURCE  /* clock_gettime, asprintf */\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n#include <stdatomic.h>\n#include <errno.h>\n\n#include \"uthash.h\"        /* Single-header hash map: https://troydhanson.github.io/uthash/ */\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------\n * Compatibility shim for logging; falls back to stderr if the\n * project-wide logger header is not available at build time.\n * ------------------------------------------------------------ */\n#ifdef HAVE_MM_LOGGER\n#   include \"mm_logger.h\"\n#else\n#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_INFO  \"INFO\"\n#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_WARN  \"WARN\"\n#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_ERR   \"ERROR\"\n#   define MM_LOG(_lvl_, _fmt_, ...) \\\n        fprintf(stderr,\"[%s] %s:%d: \" _fmt_ \"\\n\",_lvl_,__FILE__,__LINE__,##__VA_ARGS__)\n#   define mm_log_info(...)   MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_INFO, __VA_ARGS__)\n#   define mm_log_warn(...)   MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_WARN, __VA_ARGS__)\n#   define mm_log_error(...)  MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_ERR, __VA_ARGS__)\n#endif /* HAVE_MM_LOGGER */\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------\n * Public API\n * ------------------------------------------------------------ */\n#ifndef RESPONSE_CACHE_H\n#define RESPONSE_CACHE_H\n\ntypedef struct response_cache response_cache_t;\n\n/* Create cache with a maximum number of live entries and a default TTL (sec). */\nresponse_cache_t *rcache_create(size_t max_entries, uint32_t default_ttl_sec);\n\n/* Destroy cache and release all resources. */\nvoid rcache_destroy(response_cache_t *cache);\n\n/* Insert or replace a cached object.",
    "filePath": "/workspace/project/src/module_52.txt",
    "numLines": 60,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 454
  },
  "type": "text"
}

  "newString": "#define _GNU_SOURCE  /* clock_gettime, asprintf */\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n#include <stdatomic.h>\n#include <errno.h>\n\n#include \"uthash.h\"        /* Single-header hash map: https://troydhanson.github.io/uthash/ */\n#include \"logging.h\"\n\n/* Map legacy logging macros to new centralized logging */\n#define mm_log_info(...)   LOG_INFO(__VA_ARGS__)\n#define mm_log_warn(...)   LOG_WARN(__VA_ARGS__)\n#define mm_log_error(...)  LOG_ERROR(__VA_ARGS__)",
  "oldString": "#define _GNU_SOURCE  /* clock_gettime, asprintf */\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n#include <stdatomic.h>\n#include <errno.h>\n\n#include \"uthash.h\"        /* Single-header hash map: https://troydhanson.github.io/uthash/ */\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------\n * Compatibility shim for logging; falls back to stderr if the\n * project-wide logger header is not available at build time.\n * ------------------------------------------------------------ */\n#ifdef HAVE_MM_LOGGER\n#   include \"mm_logger.h\"\n#else\n#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_INFO  \"INFO\"\n#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_WARN  \"WARN\"\n#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_ERR   \"ERROR\"\n#   define MM_LOG(_lvl_, _fmt_, ...) \\\n        fprintf(stderr,\"[%s] %s:%d: \" _fmt_ \"\\n\",_lvl_,__FILE__,__LINE__,##__VA_ARGS__)\n#   define mm_log_info(...)   MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_INFO, __VA_ARGS__)\n#   define mm_log_warn(...)   MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_WARN, __VA_ARGS__)\n#   define mm_log_error(...)  MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_ERR, __VA_ARGS__)\n#endif /* HAVE_MM_LOGGER */",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * MercuryMonolith Commerce Hub\n * --------------------------------------\n * Module 52  : response_cache\n * File       : src/module_52.txt   (compiled as C source)\n *\n * High-performance in-memory HTTP response cache with LRU eviction, TTL support,\n * structured logging, and Prometheus-compatible metrics export.\n *\n * The cache is designed to be shared across REST / GraphQL endpoints inside the\n * monolith and is 100 % thread-safe (single global mutex for simplicity; can be\n * replaced with sharding or read-write locks if contention becomes measurable).\n *\n * SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\n */\n\n#define _GNU_SOURCE  /* clock_gettime, asprintf */\n#include <stdio.h>\n#include <stdlib.h>\n#include <stdint.h>\n#include <string.h>\n#include <time.h>\n#include <pthread.h>\n#include <stdatomic.h>\n#include <errno.h>\n\n#include \"uthash.h\"        /* Single-header hash map: https://troydhanson.github.io/uthash/ */\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------\n * Compatibility shim for logging; falls back to stderr if the\n * project-wide logger header is not available at build time.\n * ------------------------------------------------------------ */\n#ifdef HAVE_MM_LOGGER\n#   include \"mm_logger.h\"\n#else\n#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_INFO  \"INFO\"\n#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_WARN  \"WARN\"\n#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_ERR   \"ERROR\"\n#   define MM_LOG(_lvl_, _fmt_, ...) \\\n        fprintf(stderr,\"[%s] %s:%d: \" _fmt_ \"\\n\",_lvl_,__FILE__,__LINE__,##__VA_ARGS__)\n#   define mm_log_info(...)   MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_INFO, __VA_ARGS__)\n#   define mm_log_warn(...)   MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_WARN, __VA_ARGS__)\n#   define mm_log_error(...)  MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_ERR, __VA_ARGS__)\n#endif /* HAVE_MM_LOGGER */\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------\n * Public API\n * ------------------------------------------------------------ */\n#ifndef RESPONSE_CACHE_H\n#define RESPONSE_CACHE_H\n\ntypedef struct response_cache response_cache_t;\n\n/* Create cache with a maximum number of live entries and a default TTL (sec). */\nresponse_cache_t *rcache_create(size_t max_entries, uint32_t default_ttl_sec);\n\n/* Destroy cache and release all resources. */\nvoid rcache_destroy(response_cache_t *cache);\n\n/* Insert or replace a cached object.\n * ttl_sec == 0  \u2192 use cache default.\n * Returns 0 on success, -errno on failure.\n */\nint  rcache_put(response_cache_t *cache,\n                const char       *key,\n                const void       *payload,\n                size_t            payload_size,\n                uint32_t          ttl_sec);\n\n/* Retrieve a cached object. Caller owns returned buffer (malloc'ed). \n * NULL on miss or expired entry. */\nvoid *rcache_get(response_cache_t *cache,\n                 const char       *key,\n                 size_t           *out_size);\n\n/* Remove entry if present. Returns 1 if removed, 0 if not found. */\nint  rcache_invalidate(response_cache_t *cache, const char *key);\n\n/* Export Prometheus-formatted metrics to open FILE*. */\nvoid rcache_export_metrics(response_cache_t *cache, FILE *out);\n\n#endif /* RESPONSE_CACHE_H */\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------\n * Implementation\n * ------------------------------------------------------------ */\n\nstruct cache_entry {\n    char               *key;        /* hashed key (heap)           */\n    uint8_t            *data;       /* response payload (heap)     */\n    size_t              size;       /* payload size                */\n    struct timespec     expires_at; /* absolute expiry time        */\n\n    struct cache_entry *prev;       /* LRU double-linked list      */\n    struct cache_entry *next;\n\n    UT_hash_handle      hh;         /* uthash handle               */\n};\n\nstruct response_cache {\n    struct cache_entry *table;      /* uthash hash table           */\n    struct cache_entry *lru_head;   /* most recent                 */\n    struct cache_entry *lru_tail;   /* least recent                */\n    size_t              max_entries;\n    size_t              cur_entries;\n    uint32_t            default_ttl;\n\n    pthread_mutex_t     mtx;        /* single cache lock           */\n\n    /* Prometheus metrics (atomic for lock-free reads) */\n    atomic_uint_fast64_t metric_hits;\n    atomic_uint_fast64_t metric_misses;\n    atomic_uint_fast64_t metric_evictions;\n};\n\n/* --------------------------------------\n * Time helpers\n * -------------------------------------- */\nstatic inline struct timespec\nts_now(void)\n{\n    struct timespec ts;\n    clock_gettime(CLOCK_REALTIME, &ts);\n    return ts;\n}\n\nstatic inline struct timespec\nts_add_sec(struct timespec ts, uint32_t sec)\n{\n    ts.tv_sec += sec;\n    return ts;\n}\n\nstatic inline int\nts_is_expired(struct timespec now, struct timespec expires_at)\n{\n    return (now.tv_sec >  expires_at.tv_sec) ||\n           (now.tv_sec == expires_at.tv_sec &&\n            now.tv_nsec >= expires_at.tv_nsec);\n}\n\n/* --------------------------------------\n * LRU helpers\n * -------------------------------------- */\nstatic inline void\nlru_move_to_front(response_cache_t *c, struct cache_entry *e)\n{\n    if (c->lru_head == e) return;            /* Already in front */\n\n    /* Detach */\n    if (e->prev) e->prev->next = e->next;\n    if (e->next) e->next->prev = e->prev;\n    if (c->lru_tail == e) c->lru_tail = e->prev;\n\n    /* Insert front */\n    e->prev       = NULL;\n    e->next       = c->lru_head;\n    if (c->lru_head) c->lru_head->prev = e;\n    c->lru_head   = e;\n    if (!c->lru_tail) c->lru_tail = e;       /* First entry */\n}\n\nstatic void\nlru_evict_tail(response_cache_t *c)\n{\n    struct cache_entry *victim = c->lru_tail;\n    if (!victim) return;\n\n    /* Detach from list */\n    if (victim->prev) victim->prev->next = NULL;\n    c->lru_tail = victim->prev;\n    if (c->lru_head == victim) c->lru_head = NULL;\n\n    /* Remove from hash */\n    HASH_DEL(c->table, victim);\n\n    /* Metrics */\n    atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&c->metric_evictions, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n\n    /* Free memory */\n    free(victim->key);\n    free(victim->data);\n    free(victim);\n    --c->cur_entries;\n}\n\n/* --------------------------------------\n * Cache core\n * -------------------------------------- */\nresponse_cache_t *\nrcache_create(size_t max_entries, uint32_t default_ttl_sec)\n{\n    if (max_entries == 0)     { errno = EINVAL; return NULL; }\n\n    response_cache_t *c = calloc(1, sizeof(*c));\n    if (!c) return NULL;\n\n    c->max_entries  = max_entries;\n    c->default_ttl  = default_ttl_sec ? default_ttl_sec : 60; /* fallback */\n    pthread_mutex_init(&c->mtx, NULL);\n    return c;\n}\n\n/* -- internal helper ------------------------------------------------------- */\nstatic int\ninternal_put_locked(response_cache_t *c,\n                    const char       *key,\n                    const void       *payload,\n                    size_t            payload_size,\n                    uint32_t          ttl_sec)\n{\n    struct cache_entry *e = NULL;\n    HASH_FIND_STR(c->table, key, e);\n\n    if (e) {\n        /* Replace existing entry */\n        free(e->data);\n\n        e->data   = malloc(payload_size);\n        if (!e->data) return -ENOMEM;\n        memcpy(e->data, payload, payload_size);\n        e->size   = payload_size;\n        e->expires_at = ts_add_sec(ts_now(), ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : c->default_ttl);\n\n        lru_move_to_front(c, e);\n        return 0;\n    }\n\n    /* Insert new */\n    if (c->cur_entries >= c->max_entries) {\n        lru_evict_tail(c);\n    }\n\n    e = calloc(1, sizeof(*e));\n    if (!e) return -ENOMEM;\n\n    e->key  = strdup(key);\n    if (!e->key) { free(e); return -ENOMEM; }\n\n    e->data = malloc(payload_size);\n    if (!e->data) { free(e->key); free(e); return -ENOMEM; }\n    memcpy(e->data, payload, payload_size);\n    e->size = payload_size;\n    e->expires_at = ts_add_sec(ts_now(), ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : c->default_ttl);\n\n    /* Add to hash & LRU */\n    HASH_ADD_KEYPTR(hh, c->table, e->key, strlen(e->key), e);\n    lru_move_to_front(c, e);\n\n    ++c->cur_entries;\n    return 0;\n}\n\nint\nrcache_put(response_cache_t *cache,\n           const char       *key,\n           const void       *payload,\n           size_t            payload_size,\n           uint32_t          ttl_sec)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key || !payload || payload_size == 0) {\n        return -EINVAL;\n    }\n\n    int rc;\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    rc = internal_put_locked(cache, key, payload, payload_size, ttl_sec);\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    if (rc == 0) {\n        mm_log_info(\"RCACHE PUT key=%s size=%zu ttl=%u\", key, payload_size,\n                    ttl_sec ? ttl_sec : cache->default_ttl);\n    } else {\n        mm_log_error(\"RCACHE PUT failed key=%s err=%d\", key, rc);\n    }\n    return rc;\n}\n\nvoid *\nrcache_get(response_cache_t *cache,\n           const char       *key,\n           size_t           *out_size)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key) return NULL;\n\n    void *ret_data = NULL;\n    size_t ret_size = 0;\n    struct cache_entry *e = NULL;\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    HASH_FIND_STR(cache->table, key, e);\n    if (!e) {\n        pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->metric_misses, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n        return NULL; /* MISS */\n    }\n\n    struct timespec now = ts_now();\n    if (ts_is_expired(now, e->expires_at)) {\n        /* Remove expired entry */\n        mm_log_info(\"RCACHE EXPIRED key=%s\", key);\n        HASH_DEL(cache->table, e);\n        /* unlink from LRU */\n        if (e->prev) e->prev->next = e->next;\n        if (e->next) e->next->prev = e->prev;\n        if (cache->lru_head == e) cache->lru_head = e->next;\n        if (cache->lru_tail == e) cache->lru_tail = e->prev;\n        --cache->cur_entries;\n\n        free(e->key);\n        free(e->data);\n        free(e);\n\n        pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->metric_misses, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n        return NULL;\n    }\n\n    /* HIT: copy payload so we can release lock */\n    ret_data = malloc(e->size);\n    if (ret_data) {\n        memcpy(ret_data, e->data, e->size);\n        ret_size = e->size;\n    }\n\n    lru_move_to_front(cache, e);\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    if (ret_data) {\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->metric_hits, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    } else {\n        atomic_fetch_add_explicit(&cache->metric_misses, 1, memory_order_relaxed);\n    }\n\n    if (out_size) *out_size = ret_size;\n    return ret_data;\n}\n\nint\nrcache_invalidate(response_cache_t *cache, const char *key)\n{\n    if (!cache || !key) return 0;\n\n    int removed = 0;\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    struct cache_entry *e = NULL;\n    HASH_FIND_STR(cache->table, key, e);\n    if (e) {\n        HASH_DEL(cache->table, e);\n        if (e->prev) e->prev->next = e->next;\n        if (e->next) e->next->prev = e->prev;\n        if (cache->lru_head == e) cache->lru_head = e->next;\n        if (cache->lru_tail == e) cache->lru_tail = e->prev;\n        --cache->cur_entries;\n\n        free(e->key);\n        free(e->data);\n        free(e);\n        removed = 1;\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n\n    if (removed) mm_log_info(\"RCACHE INVALIDATED key=%s\", key);\n    return removed;\n}\n\nvoid\nrcache_destroy(response_cache_t *cache)\n{\n    if (!cache) return;\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    struct cache_entry *e, *tmp;\n    HASH_ITER(hh, cache->table, e, tmp) {\n        HASH_DEL(cache->table, e);\n        free(e->key);\n        free(e->data);\n        free(e);\n    }\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n    pthread_mutex_destroy(&cache->mtx);\n    free(cache);\n}\n\n/* --------------------------------------\n * Prometheus metrics export\n * -------------------------------------- */\nvoid\nrcache_export_metrics(response_cache_t *cache, FILE *out)\n{\n    if (!cache || !out) return;\n\n    uint64_t hits      = atomic_load_explicit(&cache->metric_hits, memory_order_relaxed);\n    uint64_t misses    = atomic_load_explicit(&cache->metric_misses, memory_order_relaxed);\n    uint64_t evictions = atomic_load_explicit(&cache->metric_evictions, memory_order_relaxed);\n\n    fprintf(out, \"# HELP rcache_hits_total Total number of cache hits\\n\");\n    fprintf(out, \"# TYPE rcache_hits_total counter\\n\");\n    fprintf(out, \"rcache_hits_total %\" PRIu64 \"\\n\", hits);\n\n    fprintf(out, \"# HELP rcache_misses_total Total number of cache misses\\n\");\n    fprintf(out, \"# TYPE rcache_misses_total counter\\n\");\n    fprintf(out, \"rcache_misses_total %\" PRIu64 \"\\n\", misses);\n\n    fprintf(out, \"# HELP rcache_evictions_total Total number of evictions\\n\");\n    fprintf(out, \"# TYPE rcache_evictions_total counter\\n\");\n    fprintf(out, \"rcache_evictions_total %\" PRIu64 \"\\n\", evictions);\n\n    fprintf(out, \"# HELP rcache_entries Current number of cached objects\\n\");\n    fprintf(out, \"# TYPE rcache_entries gauge\\n\");\n\n    pthread_mutex_lock(&cache->mtx);\n    fprintf(out, \"rcache_entries %zu\\n\", cache->cur_entries);\n    pthread_mutex_unlock(&cache->mtx);\n}\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------\n * Unit test (can be disabled by defining NDEBUG or building\n * without -DUNIT_TEST).\n * ------------------------------------------------------------ */\n#ifdef UNIT_TEST\n#include <assert.h>\n\nstatic void\nbasic_test(void)\n{\n    response_cache_t *c = rcache_create(2, 1); /* TTL 1 second */\n    assert(c);\n\n    const char *key1 = \"GET:/hello\";\n    const char *val1 = \"world\";\n\n    assert(rcache_put(c, key1, val1, strlen(val1)+1, 0) == 0);\n\n    size_t sz;\n    char *got = rcache_get(c, key1, &sz);\n    assert(got && strcmp(got, val1) == 0);\n    free(got);\n\n    /* Wait for expiry */\n    sleep(2);\n    got = rcache_get(c, key1, &sz);\n    assert(got == NULL);\n\n    rcache_destroy(c);\n    puts(\"rcache basic_test passed.\");\n}\n\nint main(void)\n{\n    basic_test();\n    return 0;\n}\n#endif /* UNIT_TEST */\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [

        " ",

        "- * Compatibility shim for logging; falls back to stderr if the",
        "- * project-wide logger header is not available at build time.",
        "- * ------------------------------------------------------------ */",
        "-#ifdef HAVE_MM_LOGGER",
        "-#   include \"mm_logger.h\"",
        "-#else",
        "-#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_INFO  \"INFO\"",
        "-#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_WARN  \"WARN\"",
        "-#   define MM_LOG_LEVEL_ERR   \"ERROR\"",
        "-#   define MM_LOG(_lvl_, _fmt_, ...) \\",
        "-        fprintf(stderr,\"[%s] %s:%d: \" _fmt_ \"\\n\",_lvl_,__FILE__,__LINE__,##__VA_ARGS__)",
        "-#   define mm_log_info(...)   MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_INFO, __VA_ARGS__)",
        "-#   define mm_log_warn(...)   MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_WARN, __VA_ARGS__)",
        "-#   define mm_log_error(...)  MM_LOG(MM_LOG_LEVEL_ERR, __VA_ARGS__)",
        "-#endif /* HAVE_MM_LOGGER */",
        "+/* Map legacy logging macros to new centralized logging */",
        "+#define mm_log_info(...)   LOG_INFO(__VA_ARGS__)",
        "+#define mm_log_warn(...)   LOG_WARN(__VA_ARGS__)",
        "+#define mm_log_error(...)  LOG_ERROR(__VA_ARGS__)",
        " ",
        " /* ------------------------------------------------------------",
        "  * Public API"
      ],
